title: Inbox Support Assistant – Ignite
description:
I’m looking for someone thoughtful, reliable, and detail-oriented to help me manage a small but growing
 inbox.



I run Ignite, a business supporting women in their sixties and beyond to think differently about this stage of life and design what comes next. As more women find their way into my world, I’m receiving a steady flow of simple
 queries that now need careful handling.



This is a light, ongoing role — around one hour every other day — but it’s important work. The women writing in deserve to feel acknowledged and responded to with warmth and respect.



What you’ll be doing

Responding to straightforward
s using pre-written templates (for example, resending materials that haven’t arrived)

Attaching the correct documents and sending them promptly

Deleting obvious spam or irrelevant
s

Flagging anything that needs my personal attention

What matters most

You write clear, natural, grammatically correct English

You pay close attention to detail (this is essential)

You follow instructions carefully and consistently

You have a calm, respectful tone — never abrupt or overly corporate

You know when something should be passed back rather than handled independently

What this role is not



This isn’t a customer service role in the traditional sense.

You won’t be handling complaints or making decisions on my behalf.



It’s about quietly and reliably keeping things running, so I can focus on the deeper work.



Practical details

Around 1 hour every other day (flexible timing, but consistency matters)

Fully remote

Ongoing role

To apply



Please send a short note telling me a little about you, and include a brief example of a similar task you’ve handled (if you have one).



I may also ask you to respond to a couple of sample
s so I can see how you approach things.



There’s something very intentional about how Ignite communicates, so I’m looking for someone who will respect that and take care with it.



NB Please begin your application with the words ‘Steady and thoughtful’ so I know you’ve read this carefully.

–40 minute VSLs as well as short VSLs (3–5 minutes).



This is not typical YouTube editing.

You must understand sales psychology, pacing, and retention for paid traffic.



If you’ve never edited long-form direct response 
 for

Here is an example of the type of long-form VSL editing style we are looking for:

What You’ll Be Editing



• Long-form VSLs (10–40 minutes) for
 ad funnels

• Short VSLs (3–5 minutes)

• Advertorial-style videos

• Performance marketing creatives



Typical editing elements include:



• b-roll

• motion graphics

title: Social Media + Content Assisant (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok)

I’m looking for a detail-oriented and visually strong content assistant to support my personal brand, Wild Lotus Tarot.



Wild Lotus Tarot is a premium, social media-led brand delivering intuitive guidance and transformational insight to a global audience of 140,000+ across Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok.



This role is focused on content execution, organisation, and support. You’ll be working closely with the founder to ensure content is produced, scheduled, and managed consistently to a high standard.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES 

Content Production & Scheduling

Edit and upload YouTube videos (training provided)

Assemble short-form video content (Reels/TikTok) from provided assets

Schedule posts across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

Repurpose content across platforms

Maintain organised content folders and file systems



SOCIAL MEDIA SUPPORT

Post and schedule content

Engage with audience through likes and simple replies (templates provided)

Monitor and flag important comments or messages

Assist with DM sorting and lead organisation



CLIENT & REPORT SUPPORT

Extract transcripts from readings

Use structured prompts to generate AI-assisted report drafts

Format and prepare report documents (Adobe InDesign / Photoshop)

Organise and package files for delivery



GENERAL SUPPORT

Maintain content tracking spreadsheets

Assist with light research (content formats, references, trends)

Support ongoing organisation and system improvements



SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

Strong attention to detail (essential)

Strong visual eye and attention to aesthetic detail

Good written English

Ability to follow instructions closely and work independently



EXPERIENCE WITH:

YouTube uploads and backend

Instagram & TikTok posting and scheduling

Basic video editing (iMovie or similar)



INTERMEDIATE SKILLS IN:

Adobe Photoshop

Adobe InDesign

(Licences can be provided if needed)

Understanding of social media content performance and basic content optimisation

Comfortable using Google Drive and managing files



IDEAL CANDIDATE

Organised, reliable, and consistent

Detail-oriented with a strong sense of visual presentation

Able to manage multiple tasks and follow structured processes

Proactive and able to take initiative when tasks are complete

Interested in long-term work

Experience in a similar content or assistant role



HOURS & PAY

title: Short-Form AI Video Editor for Influencer Social Media Growth (TikTok/Reels)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Higgsfield AI Editor Specialist who knows how to create high-quality, viral AI-generated short-form content for influencer models.



This position is ONLY for candidates with proven experience in Higgsfield and AI editing.

If you do not have real experience with these tools, please do not apply.

• Create high-quality AI reels using Higgsfield and similar platforms like Kling AI and Wavespeed

• Use advanced motion control to create dynamic, viral-style videos

• Understand how camera movement, zoom, cinematic motion and pacing increase engagement

• Generate ultra high-quality images using Nano Banana Pro

• Use ChatGPT to create and optimize powerful prompts

• Study viral content from other influencers

• Save and analyze high-performing reels

• Recreate viral formats using Nano Banana Pro + motion control

• Replace the original influencer with our model in a new, unique version

• Adapt all content to each model’s persona & branding

• Continuously test and improve viral performance



You MUST Have:



• Proven experience with Higgsfield (And kling AI + wavespeed) 

• Strong understanding of motion control inside AI video tools

• Experience creating viral short-form content

• Advanced prompt writing skills

• Ability to use ChatGPT to refine and optimize prompts

• Experience generating ultra-realistic AI images

• Strong understanding of lighting, realism, detail & proportions

• Experience with video editing software (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

• Understanding of how to ethically recreate viral concepts without direct copying



This is NOT a beginner role.



What We Expect:



• Consistent output of high-quality reels

• Strong understanding of viral psychology

• Ability to identify trends early

• Creative execution of trending formats

• Focus on engagement, hooks and retention



Compensation:



Competitive salary based on experience.

Long-term opportunity with performance bonuses for viral results.



To Apply:



Send:



Examples of Higgsfield videos you created



Examples showing motion control usage



Examples of AI-generated images

What AI tools you are experienced with



Applications without portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Amazon Account Manager (UK & USA)
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Amazon Account Manager to help manage and grow our Amazon business in both the UK and USA.

You will be responsible for day-to-day account management, listing optimisation, customer service, improving conversion and AOV and ensuring smooth operations. (Please note: this role does not include PPC management).

We are offering $
per month for 40 hours a week, plus an annual bonus (depending on performance), 15 days annual leave and Philippines public holidays.

Application deadline is 17th April. Please do not apply after this date.



About Us

We are a UK-based, family-run business selling Christian cards and gifts with a focus on creative, meaningful design. Our products are sold via Amazon UK, Amazon USA, our own website, wholesale, Etsy and Walmart. We have been trading for 19 years and genuinely love what we do. 

We are a team of 6 people, all based in the UK. We are members of the Titan Network, and any new employee would be required to complete their online training.



Key Responsibilities



Account Management

• Monitor Seller Central (UK & US) 

• Resolve listing issues (suppressed listings, errors) 

• Improve conversion rate

• Improve Average Order Value



Listing Creation & Optimisation

• Improve titles, bullet points, and keywords 

• Help create and update A+ Content 

• Work with images and content 



Inventory & Operations

• Track stock levels and flag low inventory 

• Assist with FBA shipments 



Customer Service

• Respond to customer messages 

• Monitor reviews and feedback



Who you are

You are a reliable team player who can be trusted to work independently with minimal supervision. You are proactive, willing to learn, and comfortable researching solutions online.

You have a strong and stable internet connection (95%+ uptime).

You are available for a weekly tea
eting on Tuesdays from 9:30–11:30am UK time.

You have excellent spoken and written English.

As we are a Christian company selling Christian products, being a Christian is preferred but not essential.



The Ideal Candidate

• Excellent written and spoken English 

• Honest, with excellent character, upholds ethical business principles and has a team-oriented mindset (essential) 

• At least 2 years’ experience with Amazon FBA 

• Strong research skills and self-motivated 

• Reliable, with great attention to detail 

In short: someone who cares, is competent, and is committed.



To Apply

Please apply with your CV and include details of your Amazon experience and any relevant training.

Please do not use AI to write your application
—we would prefer to hear from you in your own words, even if they are not perfect.

Also, please tell us the last book you read (there is no right or wrong answer). Applications without an answer will be screened out.

If you are selected for Phase 2 of the application process, you will receive a follow-up
 with some simple tasks. From there, a final five candidates will be selected for interview.

If you do not hear from us within one week, we regret that your application has not been successful—but we thank you for your interest.

title: Video Editor at Established Agency!
description:
Hello! Welcome to one of the first job posts you’ve seen in a while that’s not written by AI haha : )



I’m Alvie, and I run a social media content agency that’s been growing steadily for nearly five years.



Our mission is simple: make amazing content, deliver awesome results, and have the happiest team and the happiest clients in the industry.



We’ve grown a lot over the past year, and we’re now looking for a Video Editor who’s excited to grow with us.



It’s a super friendly, supportive team environment — and we have big plans to work with some huge names in the industry while continuing to build something awesome.



What You’ll Do



• Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Add captions, text overlays, and smooth transitions to create engaging, high-retention content

• Match each client’s unique brand and style

• Follow clear workflows and keep projects organized



What You’ll Gain



• Ongoing, consistent video editing work with long-term potential

• Opportunities to level up your editing skills through feedback, collaboration, and new challenges

• A friendly, supportive team environment

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Structural Engineer
description:
Location: Work from Home



Type of Employment: Full-time



Work Shift: USA Business Hours



Position Overview:



We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer fluent in Metal Structures and Wood Frame Structures for Residential and Commercial Real Estate projects. The ideal candidate will have substantial experience in structural engineering, particularly in designing steel and wood frame structures for the real estate industry.



Responsibilities:



Design a new 14 ft x 24 ft steel frame:

Carry a 15K - 20K lbs modular housing structure from factory to foundation on a flat-bed truck.

Ensure the frame withstands the stress of 2-point loading (spanning 24ft) within 1-inch deflection at mid-point during the lift procedure from 6 inches above floor to truck bed height of 32 inches above grade via a tilt-bed truck.

Ensure the frame withstands loading at the factory to unloading to foundation in the field (32 inches above grade to 20 inches above grade).

Design a steel frame structure that is lightweight and easy to fabricate, requiring less than 30 man-hours (of cutting, drilling, welding, etc.).

F40 - Strengthen existing 12 ft x 40 ft steel chassis design:

Re-engineer existing steel frame chassis structures to reduce deflection at midpoint during the lift procedure.

Address current deflection issues that cause damage to the finished interiors of the residential unit (drywall cracking, buckling).

14x24 Foundation - with PE Seal:

Design and seal (if possible) reinforced concrete strip pier foundations for 14 ft x 24 ft modular housing units.

Utilize examples of existing 12 ft x 40 ft foundations as references.

14x24 First & Second Story:

Provide structural/architectural construction details for the first floor (module 1) to support the second floor (module 2).

Ensure modules are constructed in the modular building factory, shipped to the site, and the second floor is lifted by crane to sit upon the first floor module.

R32 Gable Roof Design:

Develop structural design details for a gable roof with a peak at midpoint (longitudinally) that supports all live and static loads when mounted on the foundation and withstands transitory stresses during the loading/unloading process and shipping across highways in Texas.

R32 Pop-up Roof Structural:

Create modular roof and side wall elements that allow transporting modular units with the roof element laying flat with a maximum package height of 12 ft (grade to highest point) and be able to lift the roof elements into place on a pivot to full height (height to be designed) in the field.

Ensure finish construction fixes the structure into place, weatherproofs and seals, and completes the finish-out of the final unit (unit will be strapped to the foundation - not to be moved again).

Top Deck Weatherproofing System:

Create the proper structural and architectural details required for a rooftop deck above the modular housing that is weather-tight and low maintenance.

Ideal Candidate Requirements:



Primary Experience:



Structural Engineer:

Professional Engineer

Has direct work experience in Structural Engineering for a USA-based Client.

Experience in completing structural designs for both steel and wood frame structures in the real estate industry.

Access to necessary tools to perform load calculations for all types of materials.

Ability to translate designs into layman's terms, detailed specifications, and resulting plans for metal fabrication.

Direct work experience with USA firms preparing design submittals for construction preferably in Texas.

Secondary Experience:



Architectural Engineering:

Familiarity with USA residential and commercial housing projects.

Ability to read, revise, and publish architectural plans.

Has experience working as an architect or for a USA-based architect.

Access to necessary tools to read and create construction drawings in CAD, AutoCAD, Revit, etc.

Benefits:



Permanent work from home

Ongoing training and professional development opportunities

Collaborative and supportive work environment

Competitive salary

title: Manager - Finance & Commercial
description:
Who We Are



SandS Australia is a globally connected business advisory, finance and operational solutions firm, proudly headquartered in Melbourne and delivering strategic, cost-optimised services to 50+ clients across Australia, the UK, US, Canada, the Middle East, and Asia-Pacific.



We empower ambitious startups, scaling SMEs, corporate enterprises, and government-funded organisations by integrating senior financial and operational leadership with a high-performance delivery model built to exceed Australian and international standards.



Our strength lies in bridging strategy and execution. From CFO support to full-scale operational transformation, we help business leaders unlock growth, streamline complexity, and operate with greater clarity, confidence, and control. 

We recruit from a global pool of over 300,000+ professionals but only the top 1 in 3,000 make it through our rigorous 6-stage selection process, including technical testing, real-world simulations, and director-led interviews. Each team member is trained to exceed Australian business standards, ensuring quality and consistency from day one.



We welcome applications from diverse backgrounds and are committed to building inclusive, client-focused teams that consistently exceed expectations. 



The Role 



This is not a traditional Finance Role. We are looking for a Finance & Commercial Manager with outstanding leadership, client relationship, and analytical skills to join our high-performing global team. This senior, client-facing role requires confidence, commercial acumen, and the ability to work independently with minimal oversight, while delivering innovative Business Solutions that drive value for our clients. 



This role sits at the intersection of financial leadership, project management, and business consulting. You will take ownership of complex financial engagements, lead delivery teams, and work directly with clients to influence decisions that shape growth, performance, and long-term sustainability.

 

You will lead strategic finance delivery across a portfolio of fast-moving businesses while building long-term trust through insight, clarity, and partnership. 



 What You’ll Do 



• Serve as the primary contact for senior clients, building long-term partnerships based on trust and accountability.

• Advise business owners and senior leaders on profitability, cash flow, risk, and growth strategies. 

• Lead strategic finance delivery across portfolio of fast-moving businesses, influencing decisions that shape client 

        success.

• Identify risks and opportunities early, guiding clients toward commercially sound decisions.

• Deliver innovative Business Solutions that enhance growth, performance, and long-term sustainability.

• Lead and progress new client and internal projects by quickly understanding new scopes of work, translating 

        requirements into clear actions, and driving delivery through to completion. 

• Manage finance-led projects including restructures, system implementations, and process improvements.

• Coordinate cross-functional teams to deliver outcomes on time and to standard.

• Build financial models, business cases, and strategic plans aligned to client objectives.

• Lead financial management, reporting, forecasting, and analysis across diverse global clients.



What We’re Looking For 



We are not just hiring a title. We are looking for a problem solver, a strategic thinker, and a trusted advisor.

• Fully qualified (CPA, CIMA, ACCA, CA or equivalent)

• Minimum 3+ years in a finance manager role (preferably in consulting, advisory, or multinational business environments) 

        and 10+ years in finance overall

• Exceptional communication skills both written and verbal, especially with Western clients

• High emotional intelligence and resilience open to feedback and driven to grow.

• Analytical, commercially sharp, and confident in making recommendations.

• Efficient, prioritised, and outcome-focused not someone who needs micromanaging.

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, global environment

• Ability to drive efficiency through smart use of finance systems, integrations, and automation tools





What We Offer

We’re not just hiring for a job we’re building global careers. Here’s what sets us apart:

• Competitive, above-market base salaries 

• Performance-based bonuses and increment opportunities.

• Paid leave with cash-out flexibility.

• Company sponsored holiday packages for top performers (local and global destinations, with family)

• Referral programs that generate passive income exceeding six figures over 10+ years

• Monthly virtual team get-togethers with paid refreshments for family

• Career progression across national and international markets



Monthly Performance Bonus

This role includes a structured monthly performance bonus in addition to your base salary, designed to reward both your individual delivery and the commercial output of your project team.

How it works:

• The bonus operates on a progressive tier framework - as the company achieves higher collective weekly billable targets,   

         greater portions of your bonus are unlocked. Your reward grows alongside the team's overall performance.

• Your individual bonus is earned by consistently achieving your personal weekly billable target across the full calendar 

        month.

• A separate team bonus component rewards you for the combined billable output of your project team - recognizing 

        your role as a manager who drives team performance, not just your own delivery.

• Bonuses are assessed at the end of each calendar month and paid with the following month's payroll, supplementary to 

        your base salary.



This structure recognizes both what you deliver individually and the commercial results you generate as a manager - rewarding you for building a high-performing team, not just completing your own work.



Salary

At SandS Australia, this role presents a unique career development opportunity, offering unparalleled global growth prospects and exposure. We are seeking individuals driven by the potential for long-term professional growth and the valuable international experience that comes with it. This is not just a position for those seeking monetary rewards, but for those who aspire to make a significant impact on a global scale. We encourage candidates to align their salary expectations with industry standards, reflecting the competitive nature of the role. Those who are not shortlisted based on the criteria are respectfully advised to revisit this opportunity after 12 months, ensuring a fair and sustainable hiring process for all. 



Final remuneration will be determined based on performance across the assessment process and final interview in line with benchmarks. 



Payment can be made in AUD, equivalent to your local currency. 



Assessment Process 



We believe in capability, not guesswork.

Our selection process includes three focused assessments designed to identify the best-fit talent:

• Technical & Accuracy – Evaluates your ability to understand completely new tasks, apply newly gathered information 

        effectively, and produce accurate, detail-oriented outcomes

• Communication & Relationships – Assesses how well you interpret client expectations and respond in a way that builds 

        trust, meets demands, and strengthens professional rapport

• Efficiency & Prioritisation – Measures your ability to stay organised and think clearly under time pressure, while 

        maintaining accuracy and applying practical judgement to prioritise tasks 

All assessments reflect real role scenarios - practical, focused, and purposeful. 



Candidates who successfully complete all assessments will progress to a final interview centred on leadership mindset, feedback openness, and expectation alignment. 

Only candidates genuinely committed to excelling through a rigorous, high-standard process are encouraged to apply. 



How to Apply 

To ensure a structured and fair evaluation process, all applications must be submitted through the Career’s Page on our website.   



- Please submit your application only through our official career portal at 

 Applications sent outside this portal will not be reviewed.



If you’re ready to lead, advise, and deliver impact across global markets, 



???? Apply here: 



For more information, Visit: 
  



Head Office:

S & S Australia Investment Property Business Advice & Accounting Pty. Ltd.

Level 1, 530 Little Collins Street 

Melbourne 

VIC 3000

title: JavaScript Developer (Rex CRM Integrations & API, Pabbly Automations)
description:
We are looking for a strong JavaScript developer to join our team long term.



This is a technical role focused on building, maintaining, and troubleshooting custom workflows, validation logic, and API-driven automations connected to Rex CRM.



Please do not apply if your experience is mainly admin, customer service, data entry, or basic no-code automation only. This role is for someone who is genuinely confident with JavaScript, logic, APIs, debugging, and solving technical problems independently.



About the Role:



You will be responsible for improving and maintaining the systems that support our business. A large part of the role involves writing JavaScript inside Rex CRM workflows and custom validation, as well as using JavaScript in Pabbly-based automations that interact with Rex through APIs.



We need someone who is logical, dependable, detail-oriented, and comfortable taking ownership of technical work.



What You Will Be Doing:

> Building and maintaining custom workflows in Rex CRM using JavaScript

> Creating and updating custom validation logic in Rex using JavaScript

> Building and managing automations in Pabbly Connect

> Using JavaScript inside Pabbly workflows to process data and trigger actions in Rex

> Working with APIs, webhooks, and JSON data to connect systems together

> Diagnosing and fixing Pabbly errors and broken automations

> Troubleshooting failed tasks, bad data, and workflow issues

> Testing workflows and validation thoroughly before deployment

> mproving existing systems to make them cleaner, more reliable, and more efficient

> Documenting your work clearly so it can be maintained properly



What We Need From You:

> Strong JavaScript skills

> Experience building workflow logic, custom validation, or automation scripts

> Experience working with APIs, webhooks, and JSON

> Strong debugging and problem-solving ability

> Ability to read technical documentation and apply it correctly

> High attention to detail

> Good written English

> Reliable internet and computer

> Able to work independently without constant supervision



HOW TO APPLY



Please send all of the following:

> A short introduction about yourself

> Details of your JavaScript experience

> Details of your experience with APIs, webhooks, and integrations

> Any experience with Rex CRM or Pabbly Connect

> Examples of similar technical work you have done

> Your internet speed



A short paid test task may be offered before moving into a long-term role.



We are looking for someone reliable and technically strong who wants a long-term opportunity and can become a key part of our business.

I will provide the script and voiceover. You will not need to do any research — your job is to create engaging AI 2D cartoon visuals, find background music, and bring the script to life visually in a style that fits the military niche.



I Am Looking for Someone Who:



Has proven experience creating AI 2D cartoon YouTube videos.



Can deliver a minimum of 20 minutes of finished content per video.



Has experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro, or similar)

Is fluent in English.



Can meet deadlines consistently — 3 videos per week, every week.



Understands how to pace long-form YouTube content to keep viewers engaged.



Style & Creative Direction

The visual style should feel cinematic and serious — this is not a kids' cartoon channel. Think gritty, dramatic 2D animation that matches the weight of the military stories we tell. You have creative freedom to make it engaging, but it must stay within our brand style (full guidelines provided).



?? If you have read the middle of this job posting, please type your favorite military unit at the beginning or end of your proposal.



To Apply, Please Answer the Following Questions:



Share the best AI 2D cartoon video you have made — YouTube or Google Drive links only

Have you ever made a long-form cartoon video (20+ minutes) for a YouTube channel? If yes, share the link

Can you consistently deliver 3 videos per week? What does your current workload look like?



Only share Google Drive or YouTube links — no other file types will be reviewed.



I look forward to working with you!

title: WORDPRESS WEBSITE BUILDER AND SOCIAL MEDIA
description:
WORDPRESS WEBSITE BUILDER AND SOCIAL MEDIA

Australian business · Sydney timezone · Remote · Immediate start



Pay rate: Up to $4.00 USD per hour

Hours: 20 to 40 hours per week

Timezone: Sydney AEST

Start date: Within 2 weeks





ABOUT US



My Australian businesses have been operating for about 20 years. We are rebuilding our web presence and growing our social media and are looking for someone who can own this work end to end — not just maintain what exists, but build something great from the ground up.





WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS



This is not a content-update role. We are not looking for someone to swap images and edit text on an existing site. We need someone who has built WordPress websites from scratch — chosen themes, configured plugins, structured pages, set up hosting environments, and delivered a finished, professional result.



If your WordPress experience is mostly logging in and updating posts, this role is not the right fit.





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Core skills (required)



- Build WordPress sites from scratch — theme selection, child themes, page structure, navigation

- Page builders — Elementor, Divi, Beaver Builder, or similar

- Plugin selection, configuration, and troubleshooting

- Hosting setup — domain connection, DNS basics, SSL, cPanel or equivalent

- On-page SEO — meta titles, descriptions, headings, image alt text, site speed basics

- Google Analytics and/or Search Console setup and reading reports

- Social media content creation and scheduling —
, Instagram, LinkedIn

- Writing clear captions and basic copywriting for posts

- Consistent posting schedules and engagement monitoring

- Strong attention to detail — spacing, alignment, fonts, and brand consistency matter

- Good written English for copy, captions, and communication



Desirable skills (welcomed but not essential)



- DaVinci Resolve video editing — cuts, captions, colour grading

- Canva or Adobe Express for graphics and social media assets

- Google Ads or Meta Ads — setup and basic campaign management

-
 marketing tools — Mailchimp, ConvertKit, or similar

- WooCommerce or basic e-commerce setup

- AI tools for content drafting, image generation, or automation





ARE YOU "WILLINGABLE"?



Are you willing and able — "willingable" — to find solutions, take action, keep learning, be flexible, and look for ways to help? Can you focus on outcomes and solutions? Do you have an eye for detail?



If that's you, we want to hear from you.





TOOLS YOU'LL USE



- WordPress — via browser, direct site access

- AnyDesk — screen sharing and collaboration during calls

- Google Meet — video calls (webcam + audio required)

- Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Drive

- onlinejobs.ph TimeProof or agreed alternative for time tracking

- Social media platforms —
, Instagram, LinkedIn

- Canva, DaVinci Resolve, or similar (where applicable)

- WhatsApp for communication and calls





EQUIPMENT REQUIRED



- Good PC — please specify model, RAM, and HDD/SSD space

- Fast and stable internet — screenshot from speedtest.net required

- Webcam with working video and audio

- Google account

- WhatsApp installed





HOW TO APPLY



Please complete the questionnaire in full. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



Your application subject line must include the keyword shown in quotation marks above. Applications without the correct subject line will not be reviewed.



We receive a high volume of applications. Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted. One more thing for anyone reading carefully: append the number 3 directly after the keyword with no space — it tells us you read to the end.



RE-APPLY. We have split 1 role that previously combined admin and WORDPRESS WEBSITE BUILDER AND SOCIAL MEDIA and you may re-apply to this separated role if you were previously unsuccessful.





SELECTION PROCESS



1. Correct attention to detail with all questions answered

2. Applicants sorted by lowest pay rate first, then skills compared

3. Best 5 (best pay rate to skills ratio) shortlisted for interview





---





QUESTIONNAIRE — Please complete all questions and submit with your application. Your subject line must include the keyword from the job post.





ABOUT YOU



Q1. What is your full name and the city/province you are based in?



Q2. What is your desired hourly rate in USD? (Note this role is paying up to $4 USD/hr and applications are sorted by lowest rate first, then skills.)



Q3. How many hours per week are you available? Are you able to work within Sydney AEST business hours?



Q4. Can you start within 2 weeks? If not, when can you start?





WORDPRESS — THE IMPORTANT ONE



Q5. Have you built a WordPress website from scratch — not just updated an existing one? If yes, describe one site you built: what was the brief, what theme or page builder did you use, what plugins did you configure, and what did the finished result look like?



Q6. Can you share links to WordPress sites you have built from the ground up? Please list only those you have created. 



Q7. Which page builders have you used? Rate each from 1–10 (e.g. Elementor 8/10, Divi 6/10).



Q8. Have you set up WordPress hosting yourself — domain connection, DNS, SSL, cPanel or equivalent? Describe your experience.



Q9. Have you worked with child themes or edited theme files directly? If yes, give an example of what you changed and why.



Q10. Describe your approach to on-page SEO when building or launching a new WordPress site. What do you check before going live?





SOCIAL MEDIA



Q11. Which social media platforms have you managed for a business (not personal)? For each, describe the type of content you created and how often you posted.



Q12. What tools do you use to plan, create, and schedule social media content?



Q13. Can you share examples of social media posts or campaigns you have created? Links, screenshots, or descriptions are all fine.





DESIRABLE SKILLS



Q14. Do you have experience with DaVinci Resolve or other video editing software? If yes, rate yourself from 1–10 and describe what types of videos you have edited.



Q15. Do you have experience with any of the following: Canva, Google Ads, Meta Ads, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, AI tools? For each you have used, rate yourself from 1–10 and give a brief example.





EQUIPMENT AND SETUP



Q16. What PC do you use? Please state the model (or specs), amount of RAM, and available HDD/SSD storage space.



Q17. Please attach a screenshot of your internet speed from speedtest.net showing download speed, upload speed, and ping.



Q18. Do you have a webcam with working video and audio? Do you have WhatsApp installed?



Q19. Do you have a Google account available for work use? Are you comfortable using AnyDesk for screen sharing during calls?





FIT AND WORK STYLE



Q20. In your own words, what does being "willingable" mean to you? Give a real example from past work where you solved a problem or took initiative without being asked.



Q21. Describe a time a website build or project did not go as planned. What went wrong, how did you fix it, and what did you learn?



Q22. What do you enjoy most about building websites and managing social media? Is there any part of this type of work you find difficult?

title: Member Support Job Description
description:
#Direct Client

#PST Hours



As a Member Support tea
mber, you will play a critical role in the member experience, ensuring that each individual receives personalized and empathetic support throughout their journey with us. This role is pivotal in embodying our company's commitment to revolutionizing healthcare and tackling the obesity epidemic through exceptional service and care. 



Responsibilities:  



Member Interaction: You will be the first point of contact for our members, managing inbound calls with patience and understanding. Your communication will directly influence member satisfaction and retention.

Voi
 Management: Promptly responding to and resolving voi
s is essential, ensuring that no member query goes unanswered and that all concerns are addressed comprehensively. 

Membership Termination Management: Handling sensitive conversations around membership termination with professionalism and care, ensuring that even departing members leave with a positive impression of the company. 



App Message and
 Response: You will manage communications received through our Enara app and
, providing timely and accurate responses to current member inquiries. 

Feedback Collection and Analysis: Actively collecting and analyzing member feedback to improve our services is crucial. Your insights will help shape our approach to healthcare and member interaction. 

Triage and Collaboration: Efficiently triaging inquiries to relevant departments ensures that all member concerns are addressed promptly and effectively, maintaining a closed-loop communication system. 

Appointment Scheduling: You are responsible for efficiently scheduling appointments, optimizing member engagement and care.  Skills and Attributes: 

Empathy and Professionalism: Members often reach out during challenging times. Your ability to understand their needs and respond with empathy and professionalism is key. 

Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills are essential for clear and effective interactions with both members and colleagues. 

Adaptability: The healthcare landscape is ever-evolving. Your flexibility and willingness to embrace change are vital as we innovate and improve our services. 

Problem-Solving: You will need to think on your feet and provide solutions to member issues, contributing to a seamless member experience. 

Team Collaboration: Working cohesively with other departments to ensure comprehensive support and care for our members is crucial. 



Minimum Qualifications: 



Healthcare Experience: At least 1 year of experience in a healthcare setting. 

Customer Service: Proven customer service skills with the ability to empathize and effectively communicate with patients. 

Appointment Scheduling: Required experience in managing and coordinating appointments effectively, understanding the logistics and nuances of medical scheduling. 

Patient Escalations: Experience in handling patient escalations, demonstrating the ability to resolve issues professionally and maintain high levels of patient satisfaction.

 Full-time, remote position based in the Philippines

title: E-Commerce Customer Support & Email Manager
description:
We are a growing E-Commerce business looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to handle our daily customer communication. Your main responsibility will be managing our customer support inbox — responding to inquiries, handling order issues, and making sure every customer feels taken care of.

This is a part-time position requiring 1–3 hours per day, ideal for someone who wants consistent, stable work with a small, focused team.



What You’ll Do

 ? Monitor and respond to customer
s daily in a timely and professional manner

 ? Handle order inquiries, shipping questions, returns, and complaints

 ? Follow provided scripts and guidelines for common situations

 ? Communicate directly with our fulfillment partner via a shared WhatsApp group — for returns, refunds, replacements, and any order-related issues that require coordination

 ? Keep the inbox organized and flag urgent messages

 ? Maintain a friendly, helpful tone in all customer interactions



What We’re Looking For

 ? Excellent written English — clear, professional, and friendly

 ? Previous experience in customer support or
 management (E-Commerce preferred)

 ? Reliable internet connection and availability during agreed hours

 ? Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions

 ? Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

 ? Active WhatsApp usage — you will be added to a group chat with our partner for direct coordination

 ? Familiarity with tools like Gmail, Zendesk, or similar helpdesk platforms is a plus



What We Offer

 ? $2.00 -5.00 USD per hour, paid weekly or bi-weekly

 ? Flexible part-time hours — approx. 1–2 hours per day

 ? Long-term opportunity with potential to grow into more responsibilities

 ? Clear processes and templates provided from day one

 ? Direct integration into our team via WhatsApp for smooth communication

 ? Supportive, straightforward working relationship



How to Apply

Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include the following:

 ? A short introduction about yourself and your experience

 ? Your availability (timezone + daily hours)

 ? Any previous E-Commerce or customer support experience

 ? Write “Customer First” at the top of your message so we know you read this fully

Applications without the required phrase will not be considered.

— Leon Spahija

title: Payment Poster
description:
We are a US-based healthcare organization focused on medical weight loss and obesity treatment. The company combines clinical care, data-driven tools, and digital health solutions to support patients through personalized weight management programs. Our team works closely with providers, payers, and patients to deliver high-quality, compliant, and patient-centered care while supporting scalable healthcare operations.



We are seeking an experienced Payment Poster to join our Billing Team. This role is responsible for ensuring the accurate and timely posting of payments to patient accounts, reconciling deposits, and maintaining the integrity of financial records. The Payment Poster will collaborate with billing and collections teams to ensure payments are applied correctly and discrepancies are resolved efficiently.



Requirements



Minimum 3 years of experience in payment posting or medical billing

Strong understanding of US medical billing and insurance processes

Proficiency in billing software and Electronic Health Records (EHR) systems

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in data entry

Strong problem-solving skills

Good written and verbal communication skills

Ability to work independently and as part of a team



Preferred / Bonus Qualifications

Experience with payment posting systems such as Epic, Cerner, or similar platforms

Familiarity with CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS coding standards

Knowledge of federal and state billing regulations and compliance



Position Details



Employment Type: Full-time

Work Setup: 100% Remote

Location Requirement: Must be based in the Philippines

Schedule: Must be willing to work during US Pacific Time hours



Screening Questions



How many years of experience do you have with payment posting in a medical billing environment?

Please list the payment posting software and EHR systems you have used and indicate your proficiency level (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced).

How often did you reconcile daily deposits and resolve payment posting discrepancies in your previous roles?

(Daily / Weekly / Monthly)

What is your level of familiarity with CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS coding standards, as well as federal and state billing regulations?

Please rate your knowledge on a scale of 1 to 5 (1 = no knowledge, 5 = expert).



Please send your updated resume and answers to the screening questions below to: (

title: Social Media & Paid Ads Specialist
description:
Location: Remote 

Company: Diversified Group with operations in Australia, China, and Hong Kong  

Industries: Professional Services, Agriculture & Manufacturing  

Job Type: Full-time, Permanent  

Salary: Competitive package commensurate with experience 



About Us  



We are a dynamic and diversified group running three distinct businesses across the Asia-Pacific region: 



- A Professional Accountancy & Advisory Firm with offices in Sydney, Shenzhen, and Hong Kong. 



- Strawberry Farms in Victoria and Queensland, Australia. 



- A Gadgets Manufacturing Facility in Huizhou, China.  



We are looking for a Social Media & Paid Ads Specialist to join our marketing team. The ideal candidate will help manage and grow our social media presence while supporting the execution and optimization of paid advertising campaigns, particularly on Meta platforms. 



This role focuses primarily on social media management and paid ads performance, while also supporting lead generation, audience engagement, and campaign monitoring. 



If you are interested in working with international brands, developing practical social media strategy skills, and contributing to measurable growth, we’d love to hear from you. 



Role & Responsibilities 



The responsibilities of this role are varied and involve both creative and analytical tasks. While experience in some areas is preferred, we are happy to provide training for the right candidate. 



Key responsibilities include: 



- Manage and grow social media channels of our brands across relevant platforms 

- Plan, create, and schedule social media content using content calendars 

- Develop, implement, and manage social media strategies 

- Monitor engagement, messages, and inquiries across social platforms 

- Actively participate in relevant online communities and groups to maintain engagement, build relationships, and support lead generation 

- Support lead generation through social media campaigns and
 outreach 

- Create and manage paid advertising campaigns, particularly on Meta 
 and Instagram) and LinkedIn 

- Write and optimize ad copy for social media campaigns 

- Monitor, track, and report on campaign performance 

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve campaign performance 

- Test and optimize ads, audiences, and creatives to improve results 

- Stay up to date with the latest social media trends, advertising strategies, and digital marketing tools 

- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure campaigns align with marketing goals 

- Ensure content is engaging, informative, and aligned with brand messaging 



Preferred Skills 

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) 

- Strong interest in social media marketing and paid advertising 

- Basic understanding of Meta Ads Manager and other paid advertising platforms 

- Organized and able to manage multiple campaigns and content schedules 

- Analytical mindset with attention to performance metrics 

- A proactive attitude and willingness to learn 



Requirements: 



- 3+ years of experience in social media management, paid advertising, lead generation or digital marketing 

- Experience managing social media platforms such as
, Instagram, LinkedIn, or similar channels 

- Basic to intermediate experience with Meta Ads Manager and running paid social campaigns 

- Understanding of paid advertising fundamentals, including targeting, ad creatives, and campaign optimization 

- Ability to write engaging social media content and ad copy that drives engagement and conversions 

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to monitor campaign performance and identify optimization opportunities 

- Experience using marketing and analytics tools such as Meta Business Suite, scheduling tools, or basic analytics platforms 

- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal 

- Organized and able to manage multiple campaigns, content schedules, and tasks simultaneously 

- Proactive, detail-oriented, and eager to learn new digital marketing tools and strategies 

- Experience engaging in online communities, groups, or forums to build relationships and maintain audience engagement is a plus 

- Experience working in a remote or distributed team environment is an advantage 

- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field is preferred but not required 



What We Offer  



Diverse Challenge: Escape the monotony of a single industry. Apply your skills across three fascinating and different businesses. 



Professional Growth: This role reports directly to the Marketing Manager and offers significant scope for career advancement as the companies grow.  



Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere in the Philippines with a stable internet connection.  



Competitive Compensation: A salary package that rewards expertise and results, plus opportunities for performance-based bonuses.  



Supportive Environment: You will have the full backing of the ownership team and access to the resources needed to succeed. 



How to Apply 



Ready to build something exceptional? Please send your application with the subject line: "Application: Social Media Specialist - [Your Name]". Your application must include: 



- Your updated CV/Resume. 



- A cover letter that addresses: 1. Why you are interested in managing social media for three different businesses. 2. A brief example of a successful advertising campaign you have led (mention the channels and key results). 3. Your salary expectation. 



- (Optional but highly valued) Links to your portfolio, LinkedIn profile, or any relevant case studies. Applications without a cover letter will not be considered. We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in our team.

title: IT Helpdesk - L2 Support ( Work-From-Home)
description:
Company Overview: 

This is a privately owned IT and telecommunications firm based in South Australia that provides managed services and business-grade connectivity. The company supports small and medium-sized enterprises by offering network infrastructure setup, high-speed internet and fibre solutions, unified communications, cybersecurity services, and ongoing IT support and consultancy. Their approach focuses on delivering tailored, proactive solutions—positioning themselves as a dedicated technology partner that helps businesses operate securely, efficiently, and with long-term scalability in mind. 



IT Helpdesk - L1/L2 Support  Role Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and customer-focused IT Helpdesk - L2 Support professional to provide technical assistance, troubleshoot IT issues, and support end-users with hardware, software, and network-related queries. This role requires strong problem-solving abilities, excellent communication skills, and a proactive approach to IT support. 

Key Responsibilities 

? Level 1 Support (L1): 

o Serve as the first point of contact for end-user technical issues via phone,
, and ticketing system. 

o Diagnose and resolve basic IT issues related to hardware, software, network, and user accounts. 

o Assist with password resets,
 configurations, and access management. 

o Escalate unresolved issues to Level 2 support when necessary. 



? Level 2 Support (L2): 

o Investigate and resolve escalated technical issues, including system performance, security i
, and software/hardware failures. 

o Support Microsoft 365 administration, Active Directory, endpoint security, and cloud-based services. 

o Troubleshoot network connectivity, VPN, and VoIP/telephony issues. 

o Assist with system upgrades, patch management, and IT 

documentation.

Required Skills & Experience 

? Technical Proficiency: 

o Experience with Windows and macOS operating systems. 

o Knowledge of Microsoft 365, Active Directory, and cloud-based applications. 

o Familiarity with networking concepts (DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewalls, etc.). o Understanding of IT security best practices. 

? Soft Skills: 

o Strong communication and customer service skills. 

o Ability to troubleshoot and solve IT issues efficiently. 

o Team player with a proactive and solution-oriented mindset. 

Preferred Qualifications 

? Certifications such as CompTIA A+, ITIL, Microsoft 365 Fundamentals, or equivalent. 

? Experience with ITSM/ticketing systems like Zendesk, ServiceNow, or ConnectWise. 

? Knowledge of remote desktop tools and basic scripting (PowerShell, Bash).

title: Sales Appointment Setter (Staffing/Recruitment Background Required) – UK & US Market
description:
Job Title: Sales Development Representative: Appointment Setter (Staffing/Recruitment Background Required) – UK & US Market



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Experience: 3+ Years

Industry Requirement: Recruitment / Staffing Agency (Mandatory)



About the Company



We are a fast-growing offshore technology services company helping UK and US businesses build and scale high-performing remote engineering teams. We specialize in providing vetted software developers, technical talent, and dedicated offshore teams.



Role Overview



We are looking for a high-performing Appointment Setter with a proven background in staffing or recruitment agencies. This role is focused on outbound prospecting to decision-makers in the US and UK markets, introducing our services, and booking qualified sales meetings.



IMPORTANT: This role is strictly for candidates with prior experience in a staffing, recruitment agency, or talent solutions environment.



Key Responsibilities:



Execute outbound prospecting via cold calls, LinkedIn, and
 targeting US/UK clients

Leverage prior staffing/recruitment experience to confidently position talent solutions

Engage founders, CEOs, CTOs, and HR leaders

Qualify leads based on hiring needs, urgency, and fit (tech/startup focus)

Book qualified meetings for the sales team

Maintain accurate CRM records, call notes, and follow-ups

Consistently hit weekly/monthly meeting targets

Nurture leads and re-engage inactive prospects



Must-Have Qualifications (Strict Requirements):



3+ years of outbound B2B sales / SDR / appointment setting experience

Proven experience working in a staffing agency, recruitment firm, or RPO environment (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

Experience selling or supporting staffing, recruitment, or talent solutions services

Exposure to US or UK market outreach

Strong understanding of hiring processes, talent needs, and client acquisition in staffing

Excellent English communication and objection-handling skills

Experience using CRM and outbound tools (e.g., LinkedIn, dialers, sequencing tools)

Ability to work US business hours



Considerations: 



Experience in IT/Tech staffing or offshore hiring models

Background in SaaS, startups, or tech sales

Familiarity with AI-powered outreach tools

Experience in lead nurturing and reactivating stalled opportunities



What We’re Looking For



Candidates who have sold or supported staffing/recruitment services—not just general sales

Strong hunters who are comfortable with outbound activity

Individuals who understand how to speak with hiring managers and decision-makers

Self-driven professionals who thrive in a remote, target-driven environment

title: Executive / Operations Assistant
description:
I’m looking for a reliable assistant who can help me stay organized and move things forward across multiple clients, projects, and operational tasks.



What I expect

-- send a short daily check-in on weekdays

-- turn my updates into clear, professional summaries

-- prepare invoice-ready line items for my review

-- translate line items into German

-- keep completed work organized by client/project

-- capture tasks and turn them into clear next steps

-- flag unclear priorities, missing information, or open questions

-- take ownership of small projects

-- either handle tasks directly or organize the right person to do them

-- keep things moving without constant follow-up





How you should work

-- organized, proactive, and detail-oriented

-- able to think independently, not just execute instructions

-- comfortable with partially unstructured input

-- resourceful and able to find solutions

-- willing to ask when something is unclear instead of guessing

-- able to work asynchronously with some overlap with Europe/Berlin



Goals of this role

-- save me at least 7 hours per month as a rough indicator of value

-- help me keep track of deadlines and maintain structure across ongoing work



Disclaimer

-- this is not a classic VA role

-- there may be idle time, because I mainly involve you in specific parts of my workflow, not in everything

-- my main time sinks are:

?-- deep work (coding, architecture, solving hard problems)

?-- communication (Slack/email, client messages, calls, follow-ups)

?-- coordination (scheduling, aligning people, chasing decisions, handoffs)

?-- admin/finance (invoicing, logs, time tracking, receipts)

?-- planning (task breakdown, prioritization, roadmap, “what next?”)

?-- context switching (interruptions, re-opening threads, re-finding info)

-- I would primarily involve you in admin/finance and planning, plus a bit of communication and coordination

-- this means the workload may vary depending on the day and current priorities

-- you are expected to think, structure, and take ownership when needed, but not to fill every hour with random activity



Apply by

-- a short introduction (keep it concise)

-- describe how you handle tasks when instructions are unclear or incomplete (step by step)

-- describe a recent situation where you had to take ownership without clear guidance (what you did + result)

-- how do you make sure things don’t get lost when you’re working on multiple tasks or projects?

-- what kind of work environment or manager do you struggle with?

title: Junior Account Development Executive (Remote — Full Time)
description:
What This Role Is

We are looking for a Junior Account Development Executive to support our sales team from the Philippines, fully remote.

The role has three clear phases:

Months 1–3: You will manage our account manager's customer inbox, learn our product range and customer base, and get up to speed on how we work. No independent outreach yet — this phase is about learning.

Months 4–6: You will begin warm outreach to a defined list of target customers via
 and LinkedIn. Your job will be to book calls, make introductions, and keep conversations moving. You will continue supporting the inbox.

Month 7 onward: You will take ownership of defined accounts under guidance. You will manage your own outreach within agreed parameters and begin building real commercial relationships.

This is a genuine development role. If you want to grow into account management, this is how you start.



Who We Are Looking For

We want to be direct about this: the most important thing is your personality, not your CV.

We are looking for someone who naturally goes after things rather than waiting for them to arrive. Someone who initiates, follows up, and does not give up when they don't hear back.

You are probably a good fit if you:



Feel comfortable reaching out to people you don't know

Write clear, professional English that you would be happy to put in front of a client

Have chased something — a lead, an opportunity, a person — and kept going when it got difficult

Want to work in sales or account management, not just support someone who does

Have energy and bring it to your work every day



You are probably not the right fit if:



Your greatest strength is being careful, thorough, and detail-oriented (we value this, but it is not the primary need here)

You prefer stable, process-driven work with clear instructions

The idea of reaching out to strangers and following up repeatedly makes you uncomfortable

You are looking for a long-term support or admin role



Experience in outreach, cold calling, lead generation, appointment setting, or anything commercially proactive is a bonus — but it is not required. The right personality with no sales experience will always beat the wrong personality with years of it.



What the Day-to-Day Looks Like

In the early months, your primary responsibility will be managing a busy customer inbox professionally and accurately — triaging, drafting responses, flagging priorities, and keeping things moving. From there, you will begin reaching out to customers via
 and LinkedIn, booking introductions, and eventually managing your own accounts.

You will be working remotely and independently. There will be a manager available, but this is not a role where you will be told what to do every hour. You need to be self-directed and comfortable owning your workload.



Requirements



Excellent written English — this will be assessed from your application. Please write your application as if you were writing to a client.

Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

Available to work UK-aligned hours (details to be discussed)

Philippines-based



How to Apply

Do not send a generic application.

Write us a short message — 150 to 250 words — that tells us:



Who you are and what you have been doing

A specific example of a time you reached out to someone new or chased an opportunity that was not handed to you

Why this kind of commercial, outreach-focused role appeals to you — not virtual work generally, but this type of work specifically



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed. We are screening for written English and commercial thinking from the first message.

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to submit a short video introduction before any interview takes place.

title: Project Manager (Bilingual: Spanish + English)
description:

 Valorable

title: B2B Partnerships Manager (Revenue-Driven)
description:
SUMMARY: Partnerships Manager (Revenue-Driven) – Remote, Full-Time | $1,500/mo base + uncapped incentives to hit $5-6k/mo or more



---



The Mission



Own partnerships as a revenue engine for our SaaS: source, qualify, close, onboard, and retain partners. You run the full pipeline end-to-end and are accountable for measurable revenue outcomes.



About Us



We built an AI-powered SEO platform that grows organic traffic on auto-pilot. Customers connect their website and we handle keyword research, content creation, auto-publishing to their CMS (WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, and others), and backlink acquisition through our partner network. The product runs on autopilot with scheduled publishing, content pipelines, and a growing backlink exchange. We've spent ~9 months building and are now launching. This role exists to build a repeatable partnerships engine that produces recurring customers.



Why This Role Exists



We've already built the infrastructure. You'll walk into 10,000+ agency leads, 100+ curated newsletter contacts, outreach tooling,
 sequencing, and a product that sells itself once someone sees a demo.



Setting up outreach takes minutes. Writing good messages is easy with AI. Running a demo isn't rocket science.



What we don't have is someone who owns the number. Someone who wakes up, checks the pipeline, follows up without being asked, books the demo, closes the deal, onboards the partner, and makes sure they stay active. Every single day.



The value of this role isn't any one skill. It's full ownership of three channels with zero hand-holding. If you need to be told what to do next, this isn't the role.



What You'll Own



Primary focus is Agency/white-label partnerships; newsletters and creators support awareness and distribution.



Agency / White-Label Partnerships (Primary)



Work a provided list of 10,000+ agencies selling SEO, content, growth, or AI search visibility. You'll segment and prioritize agencies by size, offer, niche, and pain points. You'll personalize outreach from real signals like services pages, positioning, and case studies. You'll run discovery calls and demos, handle objections, and close agreements. You'll onboard agencies so they can resell the product successfully, then keep partners active and expanding through enablement, follow-ups, and quarterly check-ins. This is consultative B2B sales with longer cycles and the highest LTV.



Newsletter Partnerships (Secondary)



Work a curated list of 100+ newsletters and expand it over time. You'll identify the right placement type (tools, partners, sponsors, quick picks), pitch with clean positioning and tracking links, coordinate scheduling, copy, and logistics, then track results and iterate on what converts. Newsletters close fastest and create social proof for the other channels.



Creator / LinkedIn Partnerships (Secondary)



Run targeted outreach to founders, operators, and marketers (5k to 50k followers) who post about SEO, growth, AI search, and entrepreneurship. Outreach runs through a company-controlled profile, not your personal account.



What We Provide



You get lead lists (10,000+ agencies, 100+ newsletters, ongoing refresh), outreach infrastructure (sequencing, templates, tracking links), product materials (demo flow, positioning, partner offer structure, FAQ/objection bank), clear pipeline stages with a lightweight CRM/Sheet format, and direct access to founders for fast approvals, pricing exceptions, and product answers.



AI helps with speed. Your edge is judgment: positioning, qualification, follow-up discipline, and closing.



Baseline Activity Expectations



These are table stakes, not differentiators. Newsletter: 15 to 25 personalized outreaches per day. Creators: 30 to 60 minutes per day of targeted outreach and follow-ups. Agencies: 25 to 45 personalized outreaches per day. CRM/Sheet updated daily with clear next steps. These volumes are easy to hit with the tooling we provide. Hitting them isn't impressive. Falling short is disqualifying.



How We Evaluate You



Pipeline quality and revenue outcomes, not vanity metrics. We care about response speed and quality (same-day replies that move conversations forward), pipeline progression (every conversation has a next step; follow-ups happen without reminders), demo and closing ability (run a clean call, uncover real constraints, close), partner activation and retention (partners you onboard actually use the product), and signal generation (you surface what's working and what isn't, with recommendations).



Hiring Process



Apply with a cover letter answering the two questions below. If selected, you'll do a 30-minute video interview to discuss your experience, how you think about pipeline, and mutual fit. From there, you move into a paid 5-day trial with full access to our leads, tooling, and product materials. You'll run real outreach across all three channels. We expect at least one real commitment by Day 5: a newsletter placement booked, a creator deal agreed, or an agency pilot committed with a named first client. Detailed criteria are shared before the trial starts. If the trial goes well, you move straight into the full contract.



Application Questions (answer both in your cover letter)



Describe a specific B2B deal you personally closed from first outreach to signed agreement. What was the deal size, how long was the cycle, and what did you do when the deal stalled?



You've sent 200 personalized agency outreach
s over 5 days and gotten a 2% reply rate, with zero demos booked. What do you change on Day 6, and how do you diagnose whether the problem is targeting, messaging, or offer?



If your cover letter doesn't answer both questions with specifics, your application won't be reviewed.



Requirements



Near-native written and spoken English (you'll write outreach and run live calls). Proven record closing B2B deals in partnerships, affiliate, channel, or SaaS sales. Comfortable running Zoom demos and handling objections live. Strong organization and follow-up discipline. Able to work autonomously with a revenue target and minimal process overhead.



Bonus if you have experience selling to agencies, running partner programs, newsletter buys, or creator partnerships, or familiarity with SEO, content, or SaaS marketing.



Compensation



Base is $1,500 per month on a full-time contract. Performance bonus is revenue-based and uncapped: 8% of net new MRR attributable to partnerships you close, paid for the first 3 months of each partner's customer revenue. Paid monthly based on collected revenue. Example: partners you close generate $5,000 net new MRR, your bonus is $400 per month for months 1 to 3 (total $1,200), and it scales with performance. The role is designed so strong performers reach $5,000 to $6,000 per month or more.



This role is designed to grow into Head of Partnerships if you build a repeatable engine.



How We Work



Practice humility: coachable, curious, no ego. Own the outcome: take initiative, drive results. Mind the details: personalization quality matters. Foster honest dialogue: direct, respectful communication. Share your perspective: propose improvements, test ideas.

title: Fast Placement! VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Project Manager / Chief of Staff
description:
**About Us**

We are a fast-moving venture and marketing studio operating across multiple industries including media, technology, and online businesses. We focus on building, testing, and scaling ideas quickly. Our workflow is execution-heavy, data-driven, and constantly evolving.



**Role Overview**

We are hiring a highly capable generalist entrepreneur to act as a Chief of Staff to the founder. This is not a task-based VA role. You will be responsible for helping operate the business day-to-day, managing other VAs, and ensuring execution across multiple projects.



You should be comfortable thinking independently, making decisions, and owning outcomes. This role requires someone who can move fast, stay organized, and keep operations running smoothly.



**Responsibilities**



* Manage and oversee a team of VAs (delegation, accountability, performance)

* Run daily check-ins with the founder and track priorities

* Execute across different areas (operations, marketing, systems, research)

* Build and improve internal processes and workflows

* Coordinate projects and ensure tasks are completed on time

* Identify bottlenecks and proactively solve problems

* Assist in launching and managing new initiatives

* Support and oversee Meta ads execution (creative testing, performance tracking, scaling)

* Support Shopify store operations (product setup, funnels, basic optimization)

* Communicate clearly and concisely in English

* Maintain high attention to detail across all work



**Required Skills**



* Strong organizational and execution ability

* Clear, structured thinking and problem-solving

* Excellent written and spoken English

* Ability to manage people and hold them accountable

* Comfortable working across multiple domains (marketing, ops, tech, etc.)

* Working knowledge of Meta ads (campaign structure, creatives, testing mindset)

* Familiarity with Shopify (store setup, product pages, basic CRO awareness)

* Self-sufficient and fast-moving

* High ownership mindset



**Preferred Skills**



* Experience managing remote teams or VAs

* Background in startups, agencies, or online businesses

* Familiarity with tools like Notion, Slack, ClickUp, Google Workspace

* Experience with AI tools and automation (ChatGPT, Zapier, etc.)

* Strong understanding of performance marketing and e-commerce



**Compensation**

Starting at $2/hour (part-time)

Opportunities to scale into a full-time, higher-responsibility role based on performance



**How to Apply**

Send the following:

– Brief summary of your experience (focus on execution and leadership)

– Examples of projects you’ve managed or operated (especially involving Meta ads or Shopify)

– Tools you are proficient in

– Weekly availability



Applications without clear proof of execution or leadership experience will not be considered.
