title: URGENT Admin Coordinator - WFH
description:
Admin Coordinator



Premium Select Finance (PSF)



IMPORTANT: Application Process



We follow a strict screening process to ensure quality candidates.



You must complete all steps below. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Step 1

 your CV and a short, well-written cover letter to 



Step 2

Complete the application form:





Step 3

Take the DISC personality test:


/disc-personality-test



Upload your results to Google Drive and include the shareable link in your
.



Applications submitted via OLJ message or missing any step will be automatically declined.



Shortlisted candidates will proceed to a final interview with the Director.



Premium Select Finance is seeking a highly organised, proactive, and detail-oriented Admin Coordinator to support our leadership team and internal operations.



This is a core coordination role, not a general support-only position. The successful candidate is expected to take ownership of responsibilities across multiple functions, including communication, scheduling, systems coordination, recruitment support, and webinar execution.



The role involves exposure to leadership, recruitment processes, internal operations, and business systems. Candidates should be comfortable working independently, demonstrating initiative, and managing tasks with minimal supervision.



Strong emphasis is placed on ownership, coordination, and proactive problem-solving rather than purely task-based or reactive administrative work.



Role Overview



Position: Admin Coordinator

Salary: 30,000 – 35,000 PHP per month

Type: Full-time

Work Setup: Work from home (WFH)

Schedule: 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM

Preferred Location: Candidates based within Metro Manila or Greater Metro Manila



You will support business operations by coordinating communication, managing schedules, handling administrative processes, supporting recruitment, assisting webinars, and maintaining organised systems across the business.



Key Responsibilities



Communication and inbox management including triaging, prioritising, and responding to enquiries, and coordinating communication between internal and external parties.



Scheduling and calendar coordination including managing appointments, coordinating calendars, and sending confirmations and reminders.



Client and general coordination including handling inbound calls and directing queries to the appropriate tea
mbers.



Business documentation and compliance support including managing key documents, tracking deadlines, maintaining organised filing systems, and coordinating with stakeholders as needed.



Broker and internal support including assisting with system access, basic admin tasks, file preparation support, and first-line assistance for operational queries.



Training and webinar coordination including scheduling sessions, preparing materials, tracking attendance, and supporting promotions and post-event follow-ups.



Systems and issue coordination including logging and tracking issues, escalating technical matters, and coordinating resolution with relevant providers.



Reception and call handling including managing inbound calls, routing them appropriately, and supporting basic call system tasks if trained.



Recruitment coordination including posting job listings, organising applications, scheduling interviews, supporting onboarding, and tracking recruitment progress.



Requirements



The ideal candidate has strong organisational and coordination skills, excellent written and verbal communication, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively. They should be proactive, reliable, accountable, and comfortable working with systems and structured processes. Prior experience in administrative, operations, or coordination roles is preferred.



If you’re someone who enjoys structure, coordination, and being a key part of a high-performing team behind the scenes, this role is for you.

description:
Requirements:

• Experience editing 8+ min YouTube videos

• Can deliver 2 polished videos daily

• Strong storytelling & retention editing skills

• Meets deadlines and handles feedback well

• Attention to detail & quality control

• Portfolio required (no portfolio = not considered)

• Can start immediately

• Comfortable with high-volume workflow

• Scripts & voice-over tools provided



Pay:

• $500/month starting

• Up to $600/month based on performance

• Long-term, ongoing work



Role:

• Edit raw footage into engaging long-form videos

• Maintain pacing, storytelling, and audience retention

• Clean audio, basic motion graphics, and visual enhancements

• Follow provided scripts and brand style



Apply with:

• Portfolio

• Confirmation of 2 videos/day capacity

• Availability to start immediately

• Brief long-form editing experience summary



Also, we've had issues with bot applications lately. To help us filter, please start your message with a fruit that's yellow when ripe, and if you enjoy baking, feel free to share a quick recipe for something preferably something Georgian or your personal favorite!

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
APPLICANTS WITHOUT RELEVANT EXPERIENCE WILL NOT BE ANSWERED!!! READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING:



***APPLICANTS MUST HAVE PROVEN VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH FACILITIES OR PROPERTY SERVICE BUSINESSES (E.G., PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, REAL ESTATE OPERATIONS, FACILITIES MANAGEMENT, TENANT SERVICES, OR BUILDING MANAGEMENT)***



We're looking for a reliable, detail-focused Virtual Assistant to join us.



In this role, you’ll work closely with our office managers. Your job is to handle the day-to-day admin and documentation tasks so our managers can focus on higher-level client support and business growth.



If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and helping small businesses run smoothly, this could be a great fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Prepare and send invoices for services and products

• Process registrations, documentation, and related records

• Complete and submit required forms and paperwork

• Assist with permits, applications, and administrative documentation as needed

• Create simple, professional social media posts

• Organize digital files and maintain accurate records

• Provide general administrative support to managers and tea
mbers as needed

• Helping with customer-related follow-ups when needed



What We're Looking For:

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal) — MUST

• Solid experience as a Virtual Assistant or in an administrative support role — MUST

• Background in supporting facilities or property service businesses such as Property Management, Real Estate Operations, Facilities Management, Tenant Services, or Building Management — MUST

• Experience handling rebates, permits, or compliance paperwork — ADVANTAGE

• Comfortable creating basic social media content

• Tech-savvy and confident, learning new systems quickly

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

• Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision



Work Details:

• Full-time, remote position

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week



To apply for this position, please follow the steps below:

   1. Use ""VA"" as the subject line of your application

   2. Submit a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience

   3. Include a link to your CV



****WE WILL NOT CONSIDER APPLICATIONS WITH NO CVS/RESUMES.***

title: E-commerce Operations Assistant (Remote | Full-Time, US-Based Company)
description:
We are a U.S.-based e-commerce company managing multiple online marketplaces including Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Wayfair, Temu, and more.



We are looking for a detail-oriented and Excel-proficient Operations Assistant to support daily operations, including order processing, inventory tracking, and basic data/accounting tasks. No prior e-commerce experience required — full training will be provided.

Responsibilities

• Process and manage daily orders accurately across platforms

• Track and update inventory using Excel

• Maintain organized data and reports

• Coordinate with warehouses to ensure smooth order fulfillment

• Handle order issues, delays, and updates

• Assist with product uploads and general administrative tasks

Accounting & Data Responsibilities

• Perform basic data reconciliation (orders, inventory, records)

• Track shipping costs, platform fees, and other expenses

• Maintain accurate Excel reports and data records

• Support basic accounting tasks and data verification

Requirements

• Strong Excel skills (formulas, data organization, tracking)

• Proficient in Microsoft Word and PDF handling/editing

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Fast learner and dependable

• Good written English communication

• Able to follow instructions carefully and work independently

Position Details

• Full-time remote position (Philippines-based)

title: Evening Guest Services VA – Serviced Accommodation
description:
Evolve Property Management is one of the UK's fastest-growing Serviced Accommodation and Vacation Rental Management companies. We currently manage 75 properties across multiple UK cities and are on track to scale to 120+ units by the end of the year.

We're looking for an experienced and driven Evening Guest Services VA to join our remote team. This is a full-time position (5 days per week), and you must be ready to hit the ground running, take full ownership of your responsibilities, and thrive in a fast-paced, process-driven environment.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



Handle all guest communications across Airbnb, 
,
, and phone — before, during, and after stays

Manage inbound and outbound calls with guests, OTAs, housekeeping, and maintenance teams

Proactively schedule and follow up on cleaning and maintenance tasks — no property should ever be missed

Take full ownership of guest and operational issues and follow them through to resolution

Maintain our Zero Inbox Rule — no message should sit unanswered or unactioned during your shift

Use Asana to track and complete all assigned tasks by their deadlines

Monitor guest feedback and respond with urgency to both issues and praise

Provide timely updates and clear communication within our internal task and messaging systems





REQUIREMENTS:



Experience in serviced accommodation, hospitality, or property management

Previous experience as a VA or remote customer support tea
mber

Clear written and verbal communication in English

Confident speaking with UK-based guests, landlords, and contractors

Skilled with Gmail, Google Drive, Asana, and OTA platforms (Airbnb, 
)

Highly organised and capable of managing multiple priorities

Solution-oriented — you don't just flag problems, you solve them

Able to work independently while staying aligned with team goals

Comfortable working under pressure in a high-growth business





WORKING HOURS:



Full-time: 5 days per week (Monday - Friday)

Must be available to work UK evening hours - 3pm - 11pm

Flexibility required depending on guest needs and shift allocation





WHAT WE OFFER:



A supportive team: 7 experienced VAs, a dedicated Operations Manager, and 3 Directors

Full onboarding and training systems already built out

Clear SOPs and proven processes from day one

Regular team check-ins and updates to support your role

Commission structure — earn more when you hit your personal KPIs

Real growth opportunities as we scale from 70 to 120+ properties





SKILL REQUIREMENTS:

Customer Support Management, Airbnb, Office and Administration

title: Outbound Lead Research & Messaging Specialist
description:
About Us

We're GonnaMakeIt (GMI) - a crypto project that's been around since 2021. Our founder, Tommy Worldpower, previously built Energi, still running since 2018.



Our main product is LP Bonds - a DeFi application that helps crypto projects keep their liquidity locked in forever, instead of watching it disappear when market conditions change. In return, users earn high yields and get an NFT that represents their position, which they can trade anytime. We're live on 7+ blockchains, partnered with major decentralized exchanges, and growing. We're early, lean, and moving fast.





What This Role Actually Is

95%+ of your day is cold outreach on X 
). You're finding crypto projects and ecosystems, identifying decision-makers, and hitting them with sharp, personalized DMs and public replies that start real conversations, not spam. When they reply, you research the project, set up a
 group with leadership, and hand off warm leads.

You're not waiting for leads to come to you. You're hunting.





Day-to-Day

- X Outreach (95%+): High-volume, high-quality cold DMs and strategic public replies. Multiple touches per lead (3-5 minimum). Messages that feel human, relevant, and impossible to ignore.

-
 Group Setup & Management: Positive reply ? you create a TG group, add the lead and LP Bonds leadership, drop project stats and context, and keep the group active. Setting up a group and going silent is not acceptable.

- Project Research: Every project that engages gets researched - tokenomics, liquidity structure, team, pain points. Leadership should never have to ask "who is this project?"

- Daily Reporting & Logging: Messages sent, replies received, project statuses, pipeline movement. Reports submitted on time, every day. If it's not logged, it didn't happen.

- AI-Augmented Workflow: You use AI to sharpen messaging and move faster - but your judgment and strategy are yours. AI-generated responses in team communication are not acceptable.





Non-Negotiables

- Weekly meetings are mandatory. No excuses, no ghosting.

- Communicate proactively. If you're pinged, you respond - not with a thumbs up emoji, with an actual reply. Silence kills deals and trust.

- Never self-close a lead. Your job is to keep doors open, not shut them.

- Track every project. Every lead, every status, every follow-up - updated daily. If a TG group exists, it stays active with context and updates. Letting projects go cold because you stopped tracking is highly discouraged.

- Own your pipeline. You don't just send messages and wait. You follow up, you re-engage, you escalate. A lead going cold on your watch is your problem.



You Must Have

- 3+ years cold outreach / DM experience (crypto or adjacent)

- 2+ years in crypto/Web3

- Strong X presence - active, credible account

- Sharp, concise writing that doesn't sound like a bot or a salesperson

- Self-starter - no hand-holding, no daily training

- Disciplined about tracking and reporting

-
 application experience 



Nice to Have

- DeFi / liquidity provision experience

- CoinGecko/CoinMarketCap familiarity

-
 community management experience





This Role Is NOT For You If

- You need scripts for every message

- You think 10 DMs a day is "high volume."

- You can't operate independently

- You treat outreach like spam instead of a conversation

- You go quiet when things get hard

- You think "waiting for reply" is a status update

title: OPERATION & GROWTH ASSISTANT
description:
Are you looking for a career instead of just another freelance gig? Residentas is an international hospitality company with premium properties in Lisbon and the USA. We are not just looking for a Virtual Assistant; we are looking for a long-term tea
mber to grow with us.



As our Operations and Growth Assistant, you will work directly with our Operations and Growth Manager -- using AI tools every single day to produce work that would otherwise take a team of five.

If you do not already use Claude, ChatGPT or similar tools as part of how you work, this role is not for you. If you do -- and you know how to get real results from them -- read on.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:



Market research and competitor analysis using AI and tools like AirDNA and Rabbu.

Building and maintaining performance reports in Google Sheets.

Optimizing Airbnb and 
 listings using AI-assisted copywriting.

Researching upsell opportunities and preparing proposals.

Supporting our direct booking funnel via Klaviyo
 marketing.

Using Claude and other AI tools to automate repetitive tasks and produce better output faster.



QUALITIES WE VALUE:



+ AI Fluency: You use Claude, ChatGPT, Replit or similar tools daily -- not occasionally.

+ Integrity: Be honest, even when mistakes happen.

+ Commitment: We want someone seeking a stable, full-time future.

+ Desire to Learn: We are at the frontier of how AI changes hospitality. You need to want to be there too.



REQUIREMENTS:



-- Excellent written and verbal English -- your writing will represent our brand.

-- Proven ability to use AI tools to produce real work, not just experiment with them.

-- Comfortable with Google Sheets, project management tools and learning new platforms fast.

-- Detail-oriented and able to work independently without hand-holding.



WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU IMMEDIATELY:



+ Applying without having used AI tools in a professional context.

+ Generic applications that do not follow the instructions below.

+ Disappearing after starting the process.



THE BENEFITS:



+ Starting pay: 30,000 PHP per month with room to grow.

+ 100% Remote work.

+ Direct impact on a growing international brand.

+ You will work with tools and methods most companies will not adopt for years.



HOW TO APPLY:

 

Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs.

In the subject line, include the code OG2.

I will then send you a link to our official application form.

On that form, in the extra comments field, write OG2.

description:
We’re a Singapore-based digital marketing agency looking for a Mandarin-speaking Virtual Assistant to support website management, SEO, and social media initiatives. This is an on-demand, hourly role ideal for someone detail-oriented and comfortable executing across multiple digital marketing functions.



Key Responsibilities

 with:

description:

title: Golf Short-Form Video Editor
description:
Company Overview:

We are Interlink AI, a digital growth agency managing the backend for a premium, high-ticket golf coaching brand based in Australia. Our client is an elite coach with a rapidly growing audience, and we are looking for a dedicated video editor to join our team long-term.



The Role:

You will be responsible for editing high-retention, engaging short-form content (Instagram Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) out of raw footage. You are not just slapping on auto-captions; you are pacing the video to hold attention, cutting dead space, and adding dynamic b-roll, sound effects, and visual hooks.



The Catch (Why You Must Know Golf):

You must intimately understand the game of golf. If you do not know what a handicap is, the difference between a pitch and a chip, or how to properly frame a golf swing at the apex, this is not the job for you. You need to know what clips look visually impressive and technically accurate to a golfer.



Requirements:

- Proven experience editing high-performing short-form content.

- Deep understanding of golf terminology, club selection, and the sport in general.

- Mastery of Premiere Pro, After Effects, or CapCut Pro.

- Ability to work fast, receive direct feedback, and meet daily/weekly deadlines.

- Fluent in English with excellent communication skills.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

We ruthlessly ignore copy-paste applications. To prove you have read this entire post and have the extreme eye for detail required to edit for us, you must start your application with the exact word "BIRDIE". If your application does not start with this word, it will be immediately deleted.



In your application, please include:

- A link to your portfolio (specifically point out any golf or sports content you have edited).

- What editing software you use as your daily driver.

- Your favorite golfer on the PGA tour right now.

title: Account Managers and Skilled Shopify Experts
description:
We’re The Cultivator, an Australian-based lead generation agency scaling local and high-ticket service businesses across Australia, the US, and beyond.



We're expanding fast, and we’re looking for a resourceful, fast-moving, detail-obsessed Account Manager to join our growing team of A-players.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a structured yet fast-paced environment, enjoys interacting with people, and knows how to drive results.



Key Details





Must have proficiency in English.

Open to Asian-American, White-American, Filipino living in the U.S., or Filipino based in the Philippines, willing to work graveyard hours

Skills in Shopify are required



What You’ll Do

-Manage daily communication with clients via CRM portal

Maintain and optimize the GoHighLevel CRM (campaigns, pipelines, automation)

-Troubleshoot issues with lead tracking, forms, or automation

-Keep internal tracking sheets and dashboards organized

-Support in ad account checks, pausing campaigns, or making edits

-Ensure clients are always updated, and the pod is two steps ahead

-Prepare weekly performance reports for the Strategist



Tools You’ll Use



-shopify

-WhatsApp (team communication)

-Klaviyo 

-Canva (light editing)



Who You Are



A natural communicator who values clarity and speed



-Extremely organized and proactive. 

You don’t wait to be told what to do

-Comfortable working inside GoHighLevel daily

-Able to manage multiple clients without missing a beat





We’re looking for someone ready to step up and grow with us. If that’s you, apply now by submitting your CV and booking an interview call here: thecultivator.co/applynow

title: Customer Service & Sales Representative (Forex Experience Required)

In this role, you will communicate with potential clients via WhatsApp, answer their questions, and guide them confidently toward joining our trading community. Your Forex knowledge plays an important role in building trust, providing accurate information, and helping clients make informed decisions.



Key Responsibilities



- Communicate professionally and efficiently with leads via WhatsApp/CRM tools

- Educate prospective clients about Forex trading services, tools, and community benefits

- Use your Forex knowledge to address questions and concerns clearly

- Follow up with leads in a structured way to maximize conversions

- Close clients using pre-approved sales scripts, adapting when needed

- Verify client deposits and guide them through the onboarding process

- Contribute to team targets and suggest improvements.



Requirements



- Proven experience in Forex trading or a strong, practical understanding of Forex markets 

- Minimum 2 years of experience in customer service or sales 

- Excellent written/fluent English communication skills, able to explain complex topics simply

- Confident in closing sales while maintaining a customer-first approach

- Experience with CRM tools (Kommo,
, Airtable) would be great

EVERYTHING ABOVE MUST BE PROVEN, please provide it in your application

mbers who want to develop their skills and grow with us as the company continues to expand.

title: Millwork & Door Take-Off Specialist
description:
About the Role:

We are a US-based millwork production company specializing in high-end residential projects. As our workload continues to grow, we are looking for a Remote Take-Off Specialist to join our pre-sales estimating team and support the preparation of accurate quantity take-offs from architectural drawings.



In this role, you will play a key part in helping us win new projects by producing fast, accurate, and detailed millwork take-offs. You will review architectural drawings, quantify materials and components, and help assemble bid packages that support precise pricing and competitive proposals.



Key Responsibilities:

-Review architectural plans to generate millwork quantity takeoffs, including:

Doors, window casings, mouldings, cabinets, decorative beams, handrails, and more

-Assemble structured bid packages for our internal quoting team

-Clarify any uncertainties in drawings and flag discrepancies

-Follow internal standards for estimating and material takeoff documentation

-Update checklists and contribute to optimizing takeoff processes



Required Skills & Experience:

-3+ years experience in construction/manufacturing estimating or takeoffs- those with millwork experience will be prioritised.

-Proficiency with takeoff tools such as Bluebeam, Planswift etc.

-Skilled at interpreting U.S. residential/commercial architectural plans

-Familiarity with U.S. architectural and interior design terminology

-High accuracy and attention to detail – precision matters

-Clear English communication skills (written and spoken)

-Strong organizational skills and checklist discipline

-Self-sufficient and reliable, with a stable internet connection (Philippines-based)

Availability for at least 4 hours daily overlap with U.S. CST time- due team are based in UK, US and Philippines. 



We're offering a permanent opportunity with a focus on growing with the business so if you're interested in becoming part of the team submit your application by filling out this form:

title: AI Content Creator
description:
We're building an AI powered Fanvue content brand and need a creative partner to help bring it to life. You'll be making AI generated images and videos, experimenting with different content styles, and figuring out what resonates with an audience. This is a hands on role where you'll have real input into the direction we take.



What you'll be doing



Creating AI generated images using NanoBanana and similar tools. Producing and editing short form video content to make it polished and ready to post. Experimenting with different visual styles, themes, and content formats. Helping identify what type of content performs best and leaning into it. Maintaining a consistent look and feel across everything we put out. Communicating regularly on progress, ideas, and results.



What we're looking for



Experience using NanoBanana for AI image generation. Solid video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or whatever you're comfortable with). Someone who genuinely enjoys working with AI creative tools and keeps up with what's new. A good eye for what looks right and what doesn't. Self motivated and able to manage your own time without constant check ins. Clear communicator who's comfortable sharing ideas and feedback.



What we offer



$500/month starting pay. Fully remote with flexible hours. Training provided on our tools, workflow, and content strategy. A collaborative environment where your creative input actually matters.

title: Social Media Content Creator & Strategist
description:
Ascend Group is a fully remote digital marketing company. We exist to equip entrepreneurs and purpose-driven businesses to thrive in the new AI economy through strategic marketing, education, and scalable systems with AI-first thinking.





At Ascend, we are a remote-first team of A-players who value growth, performance, and transparency. We move fast, build with clarity, and honor each tea
mber’s ideas, ownership, and craft. If you want to expand your capabilities, contribute meaningfully, and grow in a no-politics, high-performance environment, this is your place.





We're on a mission to amplify our brand presence and build meaningful connections across multiple social media platforms, with Instagram as a key priority. As our Social Media Content Creator & Strategist, your role goes beyond creating content; you’ll be driving impactful engagement, growing our Instagram following, and turning audiences into loyal advocates. We’re looking for someone passionate about digital storytelling, strategic in content planning, and seasoned in managing and scaling Instagram accounts, all while being relentless in the pursuit of excellence.





IMPORTANT NOTE: Only those who have completed and submitted the job application form properly via the link below will be considered for the role.







APPLY NOW and FILL IN this APPLICATION FORM: 
/AG-JobApplicationForm







Role Objectives:



- Elevate Brand Presence: Develop and execute a cohesive social media strategy that amplifies our brand voice across platforms, with a focus on creating a compelling narrative that resonates with our target audience.

- Drive Engagement and Growth: Take ownership of growing our social media footprint. Your goal is to turn creative content into viral sensations, driving a significant increase in followers, engagement, and ultimately, brand loyalty.

- Innovate and Adapt: Stay ahead of the curve by identifying emerging trends and adapting our content strategy to leverage these opportunities. You’ll be expected to continually test new formats and ideas to optimize our social media performance.

- Strategic Content Creation: Produce and oversee the creation of short-form viral videos and other engaging content that not only captures attention but also converts viewers into engaged community members.

- Data-Driven Decisions: Use insights from social media analytics to inform strategy and content creation. Your ability to interpret data and adjust tactics will be key to driving continuous improvement.

- Collaborative Leadership: Work closely with the marketing team to align social media efforts with broader campaign objectives, ensuring that our content strategy supports and enhances overall marketing initiatives.





Requirements:



- 5+ years of experience in strategizing and creating social media content, with a strong focus on managing Instagram accounts and growing follower engagement.

- Create, manage, and oversee the production of compelling short-form viral videos, effectively coordinating with all stakeholders.

- Identify and analyze viral video trends, recommending 20-30 repurposing ideas weekly.

Repurpose long-form videos into engaging short-form content for various social media platforms.

- Drive independent initiatives, taking ownership of key results to grow TikTok, Instagram, and other social media platform followers.

- Research and suggest viral formats for continual testing and optimal engagement.

- Craft attention-grabbing viral copies and design visually appealing images.

- Break down social media data to derive insights and test hypotheses for improved performance.

- Develop and execute a viral social media strategy tailored for each platform.

- Collaborate with the marketing team to generate product marketing campaigns with social media content.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest social media trends and best practices, making recommendations for integration into strategies.

- Plan and manage the social media calendar for up to a quarter.





Please note that only those who have completed and submitted the job application form will be considered for the role.





If you’re interested in joining us, apply here: 
/AG-JobApplicationForm







Job Type: Full-time





Benefits:





Additional leave

Flextime

Opportunities for promotion

Paid training

Promotion to a permanent employee

Work from home





Schedule:





8-hour shift

Full-time (Flexible)

Monday to Friday

title: Shopify Landing Page Builder

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Report layout designer (InDesign, Illustrator)
description:
We are a small international team working on data visualisation, infographics, and reports for organisations such as international agencies and NGOs. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented graphic designer to help us turn structured content, wireframes, and rough ideas into clean, professional layouts using Adobe InDesign and Illustrator.



This is not a highly creative or conceptual role. You will follow templates, structured briefs, and clear visual systems. Attention to detail, consistency, and the ability to follow instructions carefully are more important than creativity. In addition to layout design, you might also support early-stage work by turning rough notes, sketches, or Loom videos into clear, structured wireframes and layout drafts.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Layout/ design:

- Create report layouts (for digital and print), infographics and presentations, in InDesign according to specific templates

- Apply consistent spacing, alignment, typography, heading levels, document setup, and hyperlinks/ cross links, and ensure accuracy

- Work mainly in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator

- Follow clear briefs, templates, and visual direction

- Set up figures (bar graphs, line graphs etc) in illustrator for placement in indd.

- Reports ad hear to specific document setup, can contain hyperlinks/ references and more.

- Perform a final self-check before submission (spelling, alignment, consistency, formatting)

- Deliver clean, well-organised files (including clear layer structure and file naming)



Wireframing / Layout Support:

- Create simple wireframes and layout drafts based on rough notes, sketches, or Loom videos  

- Translate ideas into clear, structured visual layouts (e.g. using Miro or similar tools)  

- Improve clarity, organisation, and hierarchy without changing the core concept  



REQUIREMENTS

Essential:

- Strong skills in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator  

- Good understanding of layout, hierarchy, and typography  

- Comfortable working with detailed instructions, templates, and checklists  

- Ability to follow instructions carefully and check your own work  

- Good written English  

- Reliable and responsive  



Nice to have:

- Experience with infographics or reports  

- Experience working with international clients  

- Familiarity with Miro, Figma, or similar tools for wireframing  

- Experience working with structured design systems or templates  



What We Are Looking For:

We are not looking for highly experimental or artistic work.

We are looking for someone who:

- Produces clean, precise, professional layouts  

- Pays close attention to detail  

- Is comfortable working within clear guidelines and templates  

- Can turn rough ideas into clear, structured wireframes/layouts  

- Can improve spacing, hierarchy, and organisation  

- Is comfortable doing sometimes repetitive work to a high standard  



Working Arrangement:

- Remote (work from home)  

- Initially part-time, starting with a defined number of guaranteed hours (approx. 20-40 hours per month)  

- Additional work will be available from the start  

- Strong opportunity for this role to grow into a larger, long-term position over time  



Salary:

Competitive rate based on experience. We are open to both junior and mid-level candidates.



Test Task:

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a paid test task (2–3 hours).



You will be given:

- A production design task (layout, clean-up and formatting)  

- A simple wireframing task based on rough input  

We will evaluate accuracy, consistency, organisation, and attention to detail.



How to Apply

Please include:

- A link to your portfolio with 2–3 examples of reports, infographics, or layout-heavy work  

- A short note explaining your experience with InDesign and Illustrator  

- Your answer to this question: What steps do you take to check your work before submitting?  

- To confirm you have read this post carefully, please begin your application with the word LAYOUT

title: High-Growth Video Strategist & Editor (US Market | Viral Logic | AI-Savy)
description:
? About the Brand

Thryve Superfoods is a premium wellness brand bridging ancient artisan wisdom with modern bio-hacking. We showcase rare, potent superfoods (like Antrodia Cinnamomea) through the lens of a "Master Craftsman." We don't just sell supplements; we sell the story of 100-year growth and nature's purity.



? Why Join Us?

- Creative Partnership: You aren't a "hands-for-hire." You are a strategist. We value your input on hooks, pacing, and performance.

- AI-First Culture: We don't use AI to replace you; we use AI to empower you. You’ll have the freedom to experiment with the latest tools to stay ahead of the curve.

- Growth Opportunity: Start as an editor, grow into a Content Lead/Strategist. We believe in long-term partnerships.

- Premium Assets: Work with high-quality, cinematic footage of rare nature and traditional craftsmanship.



? Requirements

- US Market Expert: Minimum 2+ years experience editing for US-based YouTube, TikTok, or IG. Must provide client accounts and performance metrics.

- Cultural Fluency: You "get" US internet culture, humor, and visual language.

- The "Viral" Formula: Deep understanding of Hook, Body, and CTA.

- Data-Driven Optimizer: Analyze data, see where people drop off, and adjust edits.

- AI Tool Integration: Proficient in AI (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, etc.) for scripts, hooks, and data analysis.

- Strategic Logic: Ability to deconstruct viral videos, create SOPs, and build logical prompts.





? The Workflow & Compensation

- Trial Phase: Paid trial period (1 month or a set number of videos).

- Budget: $5 - $8 per hour (Negotiable based on your experience and proven track record).

- Long-term: Transition into long-term collaboration and content planning as our lead video strategist.



?  How to Apply

1. Send portfolio (Specifically TikTok/Reels/Shorts).

2. Mandatory: List US accounts worked with and performance data.

3. AI Task: Briefly explain your favorite AI tool and how it helps optimize performance.

4. Secret Code: Start application with the phrase "Mastering the Growth".

Set up, manage, and

title: 2D Animation Background Artist
description:
We're expanding our Animation team at Kea Productions, and are seeking a background artist for our 2D animation channel, Kea's Universe.



-----

About The Role

-----

We're after a 2D background artist to help us turn our real life footage, into high quality animation assets. You will be responsible for creating environment backgrounds based on existing video references, slowly building a master folder of BG assets.

The animation style is western chibi. Please take a look at our YouTube channel for reference: 

At this stage, all videos are vertical shorts and have an average length of 35 seconds. We post a new animation every alternate day, however we are always 6 weeks ahead with work.



Currently, our existing animation team create backgrounds with prompts via Gemini, however the art style is inconsistent. We're happy to discuss continuing to utilise Gemini to maintain workflow efficiency.





-----

About You

-----

- Proven experience in 2D layout and background design.

- Strong understanding of perspective and lighting.

- Ability to follow a strict "Art Bible" for visual consistency.

- Autonomous worker (We're big on working at your own pace. As long as the work is done, we're all happy!)

- No software preferences, whatever you are most comfortable with.

- Experience using Notion, Slack and Google Drive.



Please send through your portfolio and your desired monthly salary for the role. 



We're seeking a full time contractor.

title: Lead Scraper/Miner/Database Builder
description:
About the role

We are a fast-growing Australian digital marketing agency that works exclusively with buyers agents and property investment companies. We are building a comprehensive global database of every buyers agent and property investment firm in the world — starting with Australia and expanding into the US, UK, Canada, and NZ.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role. We are hiring within the next 24 hours — if you are fast, thorough, and take pride in clean data, apply now.



What you will do

?

Scrape every buyers agent, property advisor, and property investment company globally using Google, Google Maps, LinkedIn, industry directories, and tools like Apollo



?

Collect business name, website,
, phone, social media, location, and niche for each company



?

Keep everything in a clean, structured, deduplicated Google Sheet



?

Report daily on records added and flag any issues immediately

?

?

Step 3 — Test task



Required

Scrape 20 buyers agents in Australia and submit them in a Google Sheet. Include: business name, website,
, phone, location, and any social media links. This is how I judge quality — make it clean.



Submit all three together in your application message. Everyone who does this will hear back fro
 directly.



IF YOU DO NOT DO THE 3 TASKS I WILL NOT RESPOND

title: International Sales & AI Business Development Associate
description:
We are MSTR, an AI software company based in the Netherlands. We build custom AI-driven applications that help businesses work smarter and more intelligently, from first conversation to production-ready product.



Our team has around 16 people: a customer-facing team of six here in the Netherlands, and ten developers based in the Philippines. Right now, all of our sales happen in the Netherlands. We're ready to change that, and we're looking for the person to help us do it.



What this role is:

We're building our international sales track from the ground up, and we're looking for a driven person to lead that effort alongside Tom, our co-founder. Your focus will be on international markets, though you'll occasionally support the Dutch market too, where we use AI to help bridge language and communication gaps.



This is early-stage work. There's no existing international playbook to follow. You'll build it. Tom will be involved in calls and strategy, but the initiative and day-to-day hustle is yours.



What you'll actually be doing:

- Reaching out to prospects via phone,
, LinkedIn, and whatever creative approaches you come up with

- Building and running AI-powered lead generation pipelines

- Creating marketing materials that help us tell our story

- Challenging our thinking and bringing new ideas to the table

- Growing into a genuine AI expert who can have real conversations with business owners about what's possible



Who we're looking for:

Someone who communicates exceptionally well in English, is comfortable reaching out cold, and gets genuinely excited about building something new rather than maintaining something existing. You pick up new things fast, you're curious about AI and what it can do for businesses, and you want a role where your results are visible and your responsibility grows with them.



Experience in sales helps, but it's not the point. The right attitude, communication skills, and willingness to figure things out matter far more.



We assess candidates through a short video introduction rather than long application forms. If this sounds interesting, send us a 3 to 7 minute video answering:

1. A brief intro about yourself and what drives you

2. Your experience with talking to clients, selling, or any customer-facing work

3. What excites you about working at an AI company right now

4. How you approach learning something completely new

5. What you're looking for in your next role and where you see yourself long-term



No polish needed. We're looking for clarity, energy, and authenticity. Please don't read from a script.

Upload your video to Google Drive, Dropbox, or YouTube (unlisted) and share the link. Optionally include your CV or LinkedIn.



Please send everything to 
 are happy to answer any questions.



We are looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Video Editor (E-commerce)
description:
Summary

We're a multi-7-figure DTC brand scaling to $10M+ this year, and we're looking for an A++ video editor to join our creative team. Not good. Not solid. Elite.



We want someone who can do it all — direct response Meta ads that convert, viral TikToks and Reels that blow up, YouTube-style content with animations and motion graphics, AI-generated visuals, 3D renders — the full spectrum. If you're the kind of editor who makes people stop scrolling and say "how the hell did they make that?" — keep reading.



The day-to-day:



Edit direct response ads for Meta, TikTok, and paid channels — UGC-style ads, testimonial mashups, product demos, VSLs, and performance creative.



Create viral organic content for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts that feels native and gets shared.



Push creative boundaries — AI-generated content, 3D renders, custom animations, motion graphics, cinematic transitions, and anything that makes us stand out in the feed.



Edit longer-form YouTube-style content with professional animations and graphics.



Work closely with our creative strategist and copywriter — they bring the angles and scripts, you bring them to life.



Iterate fast — we test a lot of creative. High output without sacrificing quality.



Already experienced in direct response? Perfect — you're exactly what we need. Insanely talented but no DR experience? That works too. If you're behind viral content racking up millions of views and can do jaw-dropping work with AI, 3D, and animation — we'll teach you direct response. You bring the talent, we'll give you the frameworks.



Show Us What You've Got

This role is all about the work. Your application should include:



A portfolio or reel — show us your best edits. We want to see range: paid ads, viral content, animations, AI-generated work, 3D, motion graphics — whatever showcases your ceiling.



Links to any viral content you've created — TikToks, Reels, Shorts. If it blew up, we want to see it.



Examples of direct response or performance ads you've edited (if applicable).



Tools and software you use — editing, animation, AI, 3D, all of it.

Your availability and timezone.



We're looking for a full-time editor who becomes a core part of our creative team. If you're obsessed with editing, constantly leveling up, and want creative freedom at a brand that's scaling aggressively — we want to hear from you.

title: Remote Chat Sales Representative | Base + Performance Pay
description:
Most remote chat jobs are customer support. This one isn't. We're looking for a sharp, hungry, fast-thinking person to manage live text-based sales conversations on behalf of our clients. No calls. No video. Just strong writing, good judgment, and the ability to move conversations toward a sale naturally.



This is a real sales role. Not customer support. Not a VA job. You are part of a revenue-focused team and your results will directly affect what you earn.



What you'll actually be doing:

Managing one-on-one text conversations with customers and prospects. Your job is to build genuine rapport, keep engagement high, spot opportunities, and guide conversations toward purchases without sounding pushy, scripted, or robotic.



You need to read conversations well, know when to move them forward and when to slow down, handle objections without losing 
ntum, and re-engage customers who have gone cold.



Don't apply if:

- You fall apart the 
nt a conversation goes off-script

- You're looking for a passive role where you just reply and coast

- You need constant supervision to stay productive

- You take feedback personally instead of improving fast



Apply only if:



- You're highly fluent in English. Your written English must be natural, sharp, and persuasive

- You can read subtext — you understand what someone means, not just what they say

- You know when to advance a conversation and when to slow down

- You are motivated by performance and want your results to affect what you earn

- You handle objections smoothly without killing the thread

- You're reliable, coachable, and take initiative

- You spot opportunity in a conversation and act on it



What winning looks like here:

- Customers stay engaged because talking to you feels real

- Purchases happen because you set them up properly

- You notice when there is more opportunity in a conversation and go after it

- You take feedback, improve fast, and keep getting better



Pay:

- Hourly base plus performance-based pay from day one. Strong performers move into higher commission structures over time, and top performers earn well above the base. Compensation scales directly with results.



Requirements:

- Reliable computer and stable internet

- Full-time availability

- Strong written English is non-negotiable

- Background in sales, BPO sales, appointment setting, retention, or customer-facing communication is a strong advantage



To apply: 

No generic resume needed.



Please submit your application through the platform. Include your
 handle at the top of your message, as we use it for real-time communication and shift coordination.



Also, please answer these two questions:



Tell us about a time you got someone to spend more than they originally planned. What did you do and why did it work?



What is your go-to method for building trust with someone quickly over text?



Vague or generic answers tell us everything we need to know.

title: Business Operations Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Position: Business Operations Specialist

Work Schedule: US Hours (EST)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)  

Employment Type: Full-Time / Long Term

Salary Range: USD 1,500 - 2,000 / Month

Benefit: Unlimited PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-monthly

Equipment: Self-Provide



Job Summary:



Wingz are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Business Operations Specialist to support daily operations and key initiatives within our growing healthcare transportation company. This role works closely with leadership to help ensure operational efficiency, support strategic initiatives, and assist with managing business contracts and vendor agreements.



The ideal candidate has experience working with business contracts, service agreements, and vendor partnerships, and is comfortable coordinating across teams to ensure contractual obligations and operational requirements are met.



Key Responsibilities:



Operations Support

• Assist leadership with daily operational coordination and business priorities.

• Monitor workflows and support improvements to operational processes.

• Maintain operational documentation, reports, and internal procedures.



Contract & Vendor Coordination

• Assist in reviewing and tracking business contracts, vendor agreements, and service-level commitments.

• Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to ensure contract terms and deliverables are met.

• Maintain organized records of contracts, agreements, and related documentation.

• Support leadership in preparing or updating operational agreements and vendor arrangements.



Client & Partner Relations

• Support communication with partners and clients regarding operational matters tied to service agreements.

• Help address operational issues while ensuring alignment with contract terms.

• Maintain strong working relationships with vendors, partners, and internal teams.



Strategic & Business Support

• Assist leadership with operational reporting and performance tracking.

• Support projects related to business growth, partnerships, and operational improvements.

• Help identify operational risks or inefficiencies related to contracts and service delivery.



Process Improvement

• Recommend improvements to operational workflows related to contract management and vendor coordination.

• Assist with implementing tools or processes that improve contract tracking and operational transparency.



Requirements:

• At least 3 years of experience in operations, business support, contract coordination, or a similar role.

• Experience working with business contracts, service agreements, or vendor contracts.

• Strong organizational and documentation management skills.

• Excellent written and verbal English communication.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

• High attention to detail when handling agreements and operational requirements.



Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting operations, partnerships, or vendor management.

• Background in logistics, transportation, healthcare operations, or service-based businesses.

• Familiarity with contract documentation, service-level agreements (SLAs), and vendor coordination.

• Experience working with remote teams and operational tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, CRM, or project management systems.

Requirements:

• Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar finance role.

• Proficiency in QuickBooks Online is required.

• Strong skills in Excel and Google Sheets.

• Experience with Rippling is a significant advantage.

• High attention to detail and accuracy in handling financial transactions.

• Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

• Ability to handle high volumes of transactions and maintain accuracy.

• Confidence and professionalism in making phone calls to resolve disputes.

• Strong organizational skills and the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Remote Sales Representative – Legal App Outreach



We are hiring a part-time remote sales representative to help us book meetings with personal injury law firms in the United States for our legal-based app.



This is a high-performance sales role focused on cold calling,
 outreach, and direct LinkedIn prospecting. We are looking for someone who is extremely fluent in English, confident speaking with U.S. law firms, and able to discuss the product clearly and professionally at length.



You will not be responsible for closing the sale. Your role is to generate interest, pitch the product, and book meetings with law firms. Our team will handle the close.



Compensation:

- $3.00/hour (Plus Bonus)

- Minimum expectation of 3 meetings a week 

- $50 bonus for every meeting booked with a personal injury law firm

- Additional $150 bonus when that meeting turns into a completed sale

- No cap on earnings — the more qualified meetings you book that convert, the more money you can make

- Work for an American Company 



Schedule:

- Full-Time

- Must be available to work during U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours



Responsibilities:

- Make a minimum of 50 outbound calls per day

- Send a minimum of 20 outbound
s per day

- Send a minimum of 3 direct LinkedIn messages/pitches per day to law firms

- Contact personal injury law firms using lead lists we provide

- Use provided cold calling scripts and outreach guidance

- Clearly explain the product and its value in a confident, professional manner

- Handle objections professionally using the training we provide

- Book qualified meetings with interested law firms

- Keep accurate records of outreach activity and responses



What We Provide:

- Lead lists with phone numbers and
s

- Cold calling scripts

- Product training

- Objection handling guidance

- Support from our team throughout the process

- A closing team that handles the final sale



Requirements:

- Excellent spoken and written English

- Must sound natural, professional, and confident when speaking with U.S.-based law firms

- Strong phone presence and communication skills

- Comfortable with cold calling, cold
ing, and LinkedIn outreach

- Able to speak about a product in detail and answer questions intelligently

- Organized, consistent, and target-driven

- Comfortable working in a role where results matter

- Reliable internet connection

- Quiet environment for calls

- Sales, appointment setting, lead generation, or legal-industry experience is a plus



Ideal Candidate:

- Confident speaking to attorneys and law office staff

- Persistent and professional

- Comfortable with daily outreach volume

- Motivated by commission and performance bonuses

- Understands how to create interest and move prospects into meetings

- Wants a role with uncapped earning potential



Important:



- This is a sales-based position. Success in this role depends on your consistency, communication skills, and ability to generate qualified meetings that turn into sales.



- After a three month trial period we can insure a year of work 



- You are not expected to close clients yourself, but you are expected to produce real opportunities through outreach and follow-up.



Please send:



Your resume

A short voice recording introducing yourself in English

Please respond with "Im READY" to Prove you have read through everything.

A brief written message explaining your sales experience

Any experience with cold calling, appointment setting, legal outreach, or working with U.S. clients

description:

gan, the founder of Sew & Tell Co. (
), an online sewing education business based in Melbourne, Australia. I create YouTube tutorials, course content, and short-form video for a global audience of home sewists.

title: Senior Cloud Accountant (Direct Hire / Work from Home)
description:
Join the Team as a Senior  Cloud Accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!

Philippine CPA license highly preferred.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Long-Form YouTube Documentary Video Editor / Motion Graphics
description:
Please read this entire post before applying.



Start your application with the word PEPSI349 so I know you pay attention to detail. Applications without this word will be ignored.



I am building a new YouTube channel called Brand Misfire for a US audience. The channel focuses on premium long-form business documentaries about major brand failures, marketing disasters, and corporate misfires.



The editing style should feel closest to channels like CoreSight, MagnatesMedia, and partially ColdFusion:

- cinematic and controlled

- strong hooks and retention

- clean pacing

- premium motion graphics

- tasteful sound design

- not generic social media editing



This is NOT a simple cut-and-caption job.



I am looking for an editor who can help create polished long-form documentary videos using a combination of:

- strong story-driven editing

- motion graphics / After Effects work

- licensed stock and archival sourcing

- clean typography and infographic-style visuals

- cinematic sound design

- high attention to detail



What I provide:

- a fully written English script

- a finished English voiceover

- clear creative direction

- references, structure, and very specific instructions



What you will do:

- edit long-form YouTube documentary videos

- source strong licensed footage, archive, and visual material

- build clean motion graphics, number graphics, and documentary-style visual explanations

- use sound design with restraint and purpose

- create a premium final cut, not just a basic timeline assembly



Important:

I am NOT looking for a shorts editor, TikTok editor, or fast template-based social media editor.

I am looking for someone who understands long-form pacing, documentary storytelling, and polished visual packaging.



Project structure:

- start with 2 videos per month

- paid test first

- then 1 pilot video

- if the fit is strong, this can become ongoing long-term work

- budget can grow if the channel performs well and the quality is right



Budget:

- paid test: $25 for editing the first 45–60 seconds

- ongoing rate to start: $175 per video

- initial workload: 2 videos per month



To apply, please send:

1. the word PEPSI349

2. 1 or 2 of your BEST examples that are closest to premium documentary / motion graphics work

3. confirmation that you are comfortable with the paid test and starting budget



Please do not send wedding videos, gaming edits, or mostly short-form social media work unless your documentary-style work is clearly stronger.



I am looking for a creative partner who can help build something serious and high quality from the start.

title: Wordpress Builder/Developer
description:
An exciting opportunity exists for a Wordpress Builder/Developer in the online marketing and website design industry.

 

This position is suited to someone who loves to work in a team and loves interacting with clients. 



Must have a reliable internet connection and good PC.



Must know WordPress, not just how to spell it, and understand website design.



Must have CSS Knowledge. 



Must have front end page builder design experience. Ideally experience with our stack below.



Our web build stack is Astra and Beaver Builder (Pro), Ultimate Addon + PowerPack (BB extensions), Gravity Forms



We want someone who has high attention to detail and listens well to instructions.



That starts NOW, if you can't follow the job ad process then you will automatically exclude your application from consideration.



NOTE: Please submit a voice recording explaining why you are the best person for the job.

===============================================================================

Remuneration by agreement

• Permanent Basis (long term)

• 40 hours per week

• Rapidly growing company (Lots of work on its books)

The company is situated in Perth, Western Australia (So same time zone as the Philippines).

MUSTS:

• Good spoken English

• Good written English

===============================================================================

• WordPress Experience

• Prefer Astra/Beaver Builder Experience (or front end page editor)

• Must have CSS Knowledge. 

===============================================================================



We build websites, from business start-ups to sophisticated high level websites.



We have our premium level websites, as well as 3 start-up level websites, and some predesigned ‘turn-key’ niched industry websites.



We have also ‘modulised’ extras such as custom page styles, custom web forms, advanced galleries function, lead generation, etc.



We need a team player, who understands marketing, web design, and has the tech skill sets with our build stack. They must be willing to do Zoo
etings, camera on, with clients and the team. Do not waste your time, or ours, if that is not you.



We have broken the website build process into 10 distinct stages, from project setup and client onboarding right through to design and build and onto quality assurance, a clear ‘go live’ process and handover steps to project completion rap up.



There are 551 specific steps in this process, with the designers focus on Stage 4 of that, ‘The Build’, from the design concepts, mostly following a wireframe layout, to populating content, page styling, setting up and testing the forms, etc.



Really the builder/developer builds the websites following our wireframe/design layout mostly, although some tight budget projects go straight to design using common-sense ‘doorway’ buttons and site elements.



Software we use:

• Teamwork: For client communication, project management, time tracking.

• Slack for team communication

• Zoom for team and client meetings

• Process St for ALL processes and systems

• Trello for tasking

• RoboForm for password management

• One Drive for all file assets

• WHMCS for client support

• Whimsical for wireframes

• Canva for predesign concepts



What does your day look like?

• Morning check in

• Check
s for project notifications, respond as appropriate 

• Check Trello Board for Priority 1 Tasks, check tasks previously assigned

• Check in with Project Manager

• Liaise with clients as required

• Handle brief questionnaires with project manager, and clients

• Handle layout and function briefings with project manner, and clients

• Check off that process has been adhered to



Here’s the question:

Can you see your existing skills sets being suited to these daily tasks?



The Team:

We have a project manager that checks and feeds all the relative information through

We have a local tech, who handles the phones, helps in support and also does our SEO.

We have a remote tech who handles all the hosting setup, techy stuff, and all things WordPress.

We also have a remote marketing person, who is an Infusionsoft Certified Specialist on the team, who also handles some social media aspects for us.

We also have a remote social media persona that handles all our social posts, and software we use to manage all that.

Then there’s me, I focus on sales, and marketing, networking, love creating new products and services,



So, is that you? Remember, don’t theorise about this!



We need a team player, who understands marketing, web design, and has the tech skill sets with our build stack. They must be willing to do Zoo
etings, camera on, with clients and the team.



Do not waste your time, or ours, if that is not you. We want someone who has high attention to detail and listens well to instructions.



That starts NOW, if you can't follow the job ad process then you will automatically exclude your application from consideration.



NOTE: Please submit a voice recording explaining why you are the best person for the job.

title: FULL TIME Ecommerce Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a fast-growing ecommerce brand in the beauty market, looking for a dedicated Virtual Assistant to join our team long-term.
