title: Cold Calling + Email Sales Rep (Hourly + Commission)
description:
We’re a fast-growing outbound team working with small agency clients, helping them turn positive cold
 replies into booked calls and real sales opportunities.



This is not a generic admin role.



We are looking for someone who is confident in sales, excellent in English, highly organised, and fast when it comes to handling lead conversations.



In this role, you’ll be managing conversations with warm prospects who have replied to cold
 campaigns. Your job is to reply quickly, handle the conversation well, and move the prospect toward booking a call with the salesperson inside the client’s business.



Some campaigns will also require calling warm prospects who have already replied positively, so this role is ideal for someone who is strong both in written sales and on the phone.



You’ll typically be working across 5 to 15 client campaigns at a time, so being sharp, organised, and dependable matters.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Turning warm conversations into booked calls



Following scripts, processes, and booking flows



Calling warm prospects for selected client campaigns



Keeping lead conversations organised across multiple accounts



Supporting campaign performance by handling replies well and consistently



Working closely with our team across different client accounts



What Makes This Role Different:



You are speaking with warm prospects, not completely cold leads



The main goal is to create booked calls, not just send messages



You’ll be involved in both written sales and phone-based follow-up



You’ll be working across multiple live campaigns, not just one account



There is room to grow if you perform well

$3.75 USD per hour from our agency



Additional earning opportunities through one of our partner client campaigns



Small commission / bonus per booked call on specific calling campaigns



Strong performers can materially increase their earnings through incentives



This is a blended role. You’ll be part of our team, but for some calling work you may also support a specific partner client campaign that we are involved in. We will train you, manage you, and support you directly.



Who We’re Looking For:

Required:



Strong written and spoken English

Fast reply speed and strong attention to detail

Cold calling experience

Inbox management experience



Experience working with cold
 campaigns



Experience using CRMs, dialers, or sales tools



Who This Role Suits:

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys sales, likes moving conversations forward, and wants more than a basic remote job.



If you are sharp, organised, persuasive, and motivated by performance, this could be a strong fit.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Remote (Virtual Assistant)



Home Market is Singapore’s fast-growing homeowner platform that connects new homeowners with trusted interior designers, renovation insights, and home solutions.



We run curated home events and digital platforms designed to simplify renovation decisions for homeowners.



We are looking for a Marketing Manager focused on Creatives, Visuals and Videos to lead the creation of high-performing marketing content across ads, social media, and campaigns.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys design, storytelling, and visual marketing, and understands how creative content drives performance.

________________________________________



Role Overview



You will be responsible for producing and managing visual marketing content that attracts homeowners to our platform and events.



Your focus will be on creating high-impact visuals, ads creatives, videos and marketing assets that communicate clearly and convert audiences.



This role works closely with the Growth team to continuously test and improve marketing creatives.

________________________________________



Key Responsibilities



Creative & Visual Marketing



• Design marketing visuals for campaigns, ads and promotions

• Create event promotional materials (digital ads, landing visuals, banners)

• Develop carousel ads, static ads and marketing graphics

• Maintain strong visual branding across all channels



Video & Content Creation



• Create short marketing videos for social media and advertisements

• Produce UGC-style videos that look authentic and relatable

• Edit promotional videos, reels and campaign content

• Develop simple motion graphics or animated visuals when needed



Marketing Campaign Support



• Create creatives for Meta Ads, social media campaigns and digital marketing

• Work with the marketing team to produce creatives for A/B testing

• Improve creatives based on performance data and feedback



Content Production



• Develop content for social media posts, reels and short videos

• Support campaign storytelling through visuals and creative ideas

• Produce content for event promotions and marketing funnels

________________________________________



Requirements



• Strong skills in visual design and creative marketing

• Experience in Canva, Adobe, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar tools

• Able to produce social media ads creatives and short marketing videos

• Understanding of performance marketing creatives (Meta Ads / social media)

• Strong eye for visual layout, spacing, and modern design aesthetics

• Able to execute quickly and manage multiple creative outputs



Bonus if you have experience in:

• Social media marketing

• UGC video production

• AI creative tools (Midjourney, Runway, etc.)

________________________________________



What We Look For



We value someone who:



• Is creative but also execution-driven

• Understands that marketing content should drive results, not just look nice

• Can produce content quickly and consistently

• Is proactive in suggesting creative ideas and improvements

________________________________________



Work Arrangement



• Remote / Virtual Assistant role

• Performance-based growth opportunities

________________________________________



If you are passionate about creating high-performing marketing creatives and videos, we would love to hear from you.

title: Principal Backend Engineer
description:
Hiring somebody to help manage our tech stack and architecture. The initial project will be to reduce the ongoing costs of AWS. We need somebody competent who will be able to take the lead on making the correct decisions for our tech stack and architecture when trying to reduce the cost per month.



ACUK Platform — Tech Stack & Architecture



System Topology



Browser ??? website-bff (Blazor WASM + BFF) ???

                                               ???? mono-api ??? PostgreSQL

Browser ??? lettings-dashboard-bff (Blazor WASM + BFF) ???

                                               ?

                    identity (Duende IdentityServer) ????



Projects & Responsibilities



| Project | Tech | Purpose | Solution |

|---------|------|---------|----------|

| mono-api/ | .NET 6 C# REST API | Core backend — listings, viewings, locations, CRM, portal integrations | Accommodation.sln |

| website-bff/ | .NET 6 + Blazor WASM + BFF | Public website frontend proxy | Accommodation.Website.sln |

| lettings-dashboard-bff/ | .NET 6 + Blazor WASM + BFF | Landlord dashboard frontend proxy | Accommodation.LLDashboard.sln |

| identity/ | .NET 6 + Duende IdentityServer | OAuth2/OIDC provider | identity.sln |

| student-roost/ | .NET 6 REST API | Student accommodation integrations | student-roost.api.sln |



Authentication & Authorization



Provider: Duende IdentityServer (identity/)

Flow: OAuth2 + OIDC

BFF Pattern: Frontend auth handled server-side (tokens kept off browser)

Token Consumption: BFFs and mono-api validate OAuth2 bearer tokens



Data Layer

Databases

Engine: PostgreSQL (3 primary databases)

ORM: Entity Framework Core

mono-api DbContexts:

        -- Location

        -- PropertyListing

        -- Viewings

identity DbContexts:

        -- ApplicationDb

        -- ConfigurationDb

        -- PersistedGrantDb

        -- DataProtectionKeys



External Integrations

Rightmove, Zoopla, Boomin, OTM (property portals)

HubSpot (CRM)

AWS S3 (file storage)

student-roost API (accommodation integrations)



Configuration & DI



| Pattern | Implementation |

|---------|-----------------|

| Config Management | appsettings.{Environment}.json + AWS Secrets Manager |

| Config Access | IConfiguration.IfExistsGetVaultValue(key) |

| Dependency Injection | Infrastructure/ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs per project |

| Versioning | VERSION file (read at build & runtime) |

| Version Endpoint | /build (all projects) |



Test Stack



Framework: xUnit

Assertions: FluentAssertions

Mocking: Moq

Data Generation: AutoBogus / AutoFixture

HTTP Mocking: 



Build & Deployment


 
 
 test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~
thodName"

dotnet run --project .csproj



Docker & Release

./build_and_push_image.sh  # Builds & pushes to AWS ECR

./deploy.sh                # Deploy to EC2



Branching Strategy



Feature branches: Branch from develop

PRs: Target main

title: SEO & GEO Specialist
description:
SEO & GEO Specialist



Lifewood Australia — Perth's largest timber flooring showroom

Full-Time

Remote Philippines

$1,500–$2,000 USD/month

SEO + GEO + Content + HubSpot CMS



Monthly Salary

$1,500–$2,000 USD

Full-time · Long-term · Growth role



About Lifewood

Lifewood is Perth, Australia's leading premium timber flooring brand — the only business in Western Australia triple-accredited by the Australasian Timber Flooring Association as Approved Manufacturer, Approved Retailer, and Approved Supplier. With 22 years in business, 8,500+ completed home installations, a patented flooring technology, Perth's largest 400m² showroom, and a sister brand (Seaform Kitchens), we are a genuine industry leader with strong brand equity and ambitious growth plans.



We are investing heavily in our digital presence — migrating our website to HubSpot CMS, building suburb-specific SEO landing pages across Perth, and establishing Lifewood as the authoritative source for timber flooring content in AI-driven search (GEO). This is a newly created, long-term role with real scope to grow.



The Role

You will own Lifewood's organic search performance end-to-end — from technical SEO and content strategy through to GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) that positions Lifewood as the source AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews cite when answering Perth timber flooring questions. You will work closely with our HubSpot CMS developer (Philippines), our Perth marketing coordinator, our SEO agency (Studio Hawke, who will mentor and transition knowledge to you), and be managed by our Marketing Manager in Perth.



What You'll Do

Own and execute Lifewood's SEO strategy across the HubSpot CMS website — technical SEO, on-page optimisation, internal linking, schema markup, and Core Web Vitals

Build and manage 24+ suburb-specific landing pages targeting Perth's premium renovation demographic (Cottesloe, Nedlands, Claremont, Dalkeith, and more)

Develop and implement GEO strategy — creating structured, authoritative content that earns citations in AI-generated responses on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini

Conduct keyword research across traditional search and AI search behaviour to identify content opportunities

Write and brief SEO-optimised content — species guides, timber care articles, suburb profiles, FAQ pages, and buying guides — aligned to Perth homeowner search intent

Monitor and report on organic performance weekly — rankings, traffic, quote-generating page performance, and AI citation tracking

Manage technical SEO health — crawl reports, redirect audits, site speed, indexation, and structured data

Coordinate with our HubSpot developer on page builds and schema implementation

Build and maintain a backlink strategy appropriate for a premium local brand in the home improvement category



Must Have — Non-Negotiable

4+ years of hands-on SEO experience, ideally including at least one Australian or English-language market client

Proven technical SEO competency — can read a crawl report, identify and fix redirect chains, implement schema markup, and diagnose Core Web Vitals issues

Experience using Semrush or Ahrefs (or equivalent) at an intermediate-to-advanced level

Strong written English — you will be writing and editing content for Perth homeowners; grammar and tone matter enormously

Demonstrated understanding of GEO/AI search — even if limited, you must be able to explain what GEO is and why it matters in 2026

Comfortable working independently with async communication (Loom, Notion, Slack)



Highly Valued

HubSpot CMS experience (we are mid-migration from WordPress)

Experience with local SEO — suburb/location page strategy at scale

GEO certification (Coursera, GetCito, or equivalent) or formal AI search training

Home improvement, construction, or premium retail client experience

Experience building structured data / JSON-LD schema for local businesses

Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4 proficiency



What We Offer

$1,500–$2,000 USD/month based on experience and test performance

Full-time remote role with stable, long-term tenure (we are not looking for a short-term contractor)

Working with an established, award-winning premium brand with 22 years of history and genuine market leadership

Mentoring and knowledge transfer from Studio Hawke (our current SEO agency) during a structured 3-month overlap period

Access to Semrush, HubSpot, Google Search Console, Notion, Loom, and all required tools — all paid by Lifewood

Clear growth path — strong performance leads to expanded scope and salary review at 12 months

Working with a collaborative Philippines and Perth team (you will not be isolated)



Working Hours

Core overlap hours: 9am–12pm AWST (Perth time) Monday to Friday for tea
etings and collaboration. The remainder of your working day is flexible. AWST is UTC+8, which aligns well with Philippines Standard Time (UTC+8) — same time zone, so no significant adjustment required.



How to apply: Please begin your application with the words PERTH TIMBER so we know you have read this post fully. 

Include: 

(1) a brief introduction — who you are and why this role interests you, 

(2) your three most relevant SEO projects with results, 

(3) your experience with or understanding of GEO/AI search, and 

(4) your current monthly rate expectation in USD. 

Applications without PERTH TIMBER at the start will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager (Strategy & Content) - Ecommerce
description:
Please Apply here: 



You must have conversion experience - not just scheduling contents



About Us



We're a fast-scaling e-commerce company operating portfolios of 7-8 figure DTC brands across the US, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Our brands are built in high-affinity consumer categories, and we run paid social at serious volume, which means our organic social presence needs to work just as hard.



We're not building social media accounts for vanity. We're building communities that create trust, drive consideration, and keep customers coming back. If you understand the difference between content that looks good and content that actually builds a brand, you're who we're looking for.

 

The Role



We're hiring Social Media Managers to own and grow the social presence of our brands across assigned markets. Each hire will be dedicated to a specific market: US, Philippines, and Malaysia, and will be responsible for managing the day-to-day social operations of the brands within that region.



This is not just a scheduling role. You'll be expected to understand the audience, develop content strategy, manage the community where possible, and work closely with our creative and marketing teams to make sure social is pulling its weight in the overall brand ecosystem.

 

What You'll Be Doing



Content & Channel Management

•   	Owning the social media calendar and posting schedule across assigned platforms (primarily Instagram, TikTok, and
) for your market

•   	Developing and executing a content strategy that fits your market's audience- culturally relevant, platform-native, and on-brand

•   	Writing captions and social copy that reflects the brand voice while resonating with a local audience

•   	Coordinating with the creative team to brief, review, and publish visual and video content on time

•   	Staying on top of trends, formats, and platform updates relevant to your market and knowing when to use them and when to ignore them



Community & Engagement

•   	Managing comments, DMs, and mentions across all social platforms – where possible,

•   	Identifying high-value engagement opportunities - UGC reposts, brand advocates, community 
nts and acting on them

•   	Maintaining a consistent, human brand voice across every public interaction



Performance & Reporting

•   	Tracking key social metrics, such as reach, engagement, follower growth, saves, shares and reporting on them regularly

•   	Identifying what's working and what's not, and adjusting the strategy accordingly

•   	Feeding insights back to the creative and marketing teams - if something is performing organically, that's signal worth acting on

 

What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

•   	Proven experience managing social media for a brand not just personal accounts or one-off projects

•   	Deep understanding of your assigned market: the culture, the platforms people actually use, how they talk, what they respond to

•   	Strong written communication skills you write captions that sound like a real person, not a brand template

•   	Platform fluency across Instagram, TikTok, and
 you know how each one works and what content performs best where

•   	Ability to manage multiple accounts and a content calendar without dropping the ball

•   	Comfortable working independently and managing your own priorities day-to-day



Strong Advantages

•   	Experience working with DTC, beauty, wellness, or lifestyle brands

•   	Understanding of how organic social and paid media work together in a brand funnel

•   	Basic video editing or content creation skills  the ability to put together a simple story or reel without always needing a designer

•   	For PH/MY markets: native or near-native fluency in Filipino or Bahasa Malaysia in addition to English

Instant No's

•   	You think social media management is just about posting consistently - engagement strategy, community tone, and content quality matter just as much

•   	You can't take feedback or adapt quickly, content strategies evolve fast and this team moves at pace

•   	You treat every platform the same

•   	You're not proactive - if you need to be told what to post every day, this isn't the right fit



How We Measure Your Performance

•   	Engagement rate and community growth across managed accounts

•   	Content output consistency and adherence to the publishing schedule

•   	Quality of insights and strategic recommendations surfaced from performance data

•   	Cross-functional reliability how well you work with creative, marketing, and CS teams



Compensation & Benefits

•   	Competitive salary - based on experience and market

•   	Clear growth path: Social Media Manager ? Social Media Team Lead

•   	Fully remote work from anywhere within your market's timezone

•   	Learning & development budget

•   	Access to premium social media and creative tools

•   	Exposure to a multi-brand, multi-market DTC operation at real scale

•   	Collaborative team environment with strong creative and marketing support

•   	Weekly check-ins and regular performance feedback to keep you growing

 

???? We're hiring for three markets - the Philippines, Malaysia, and United States. Please specify which market you're applying for when you reach out.



Please Apply here:

title: Benefits Account Manager
description:
Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.



Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.



Values



Here are our Company Values and we’d love to have individuals who can be a culture add to our team!



What We Offer



Permanently Remote

Pay wired directly to your bank account

$50 Monthly Stipend

Annual Bonus

Performance-based bonuses

Flexible PTO

Enjoy company time off during some of the major US and PH Holidays

Company-issued Device

Career fast track for performers and internal mobility

Learn from a team of Stanford, MIT, Google and Harvard alumni

Grow With Us



We’re looking for a full-time, dedicated, and dynamic Benefits Account Manager to join our team. In this role,  you will serve as a primary point of contact for your clients, managing their open enrollment and supporting their employee benefits administration needs. You’ll ensure compliance, accuracy, and top-tier service across payroll, benefits enrollments, deductions, and reporting. This is a client-facing role requiring both technical knowledge and strong relationship management skills to deliver a seamless Human Capital Management (HCM) experience.



Day in the Life



-Benefits Administration Support

-Support clients with employee benefit setup, open enrollment processes, eligibility tracking, and data accuracy.

-Ensure correct payroll deductions for medical, dental, vision, FSA/HSA, 401(k), and other benefits plans.

-Coordinate with carriers and internal WS teams to resolve issues related to eligibility files, COBRA, and enrollments.

-Assist clients with ACA compliance, including 1095-C/1094-C filings and measurement tracking.

-Troubleshoot and escalate technical issues related to benefits modules or integrations.

-Client Relationship Management

-Build strong relationships with clients through proactive outreach, consultative guidance, and consistent follow-up.

-Train and empower clients to use WS's benefits tools effectively.

-Monitor account health, identify upsell opportunities, and partner with internal sales teams to expand service usage.

-Maintain accurate documentation in CRM and case management systems.



Who You Are



-3+ years of experience in payroll, benefits administration, or HCM support (ADP platform experience preferred).

-Strong working knowledge of payroll processing, wage & hour laws, and benefits compliance (ACA, HIPAA, COBRA).

-Excellent communication and problem-solving skills with a passion for client service.

-Ability to manage multiple clients with varying levels of complexity.

-Experience with ADP platforms (Workforce Now, Vantage, RUN, etc.) is highly desirable.

-CPP, FPC, or CEBS certification is a plus.

-Bachelor’s degree in business, HR, accounting, or related field preferred

We are looking for a Knowledge Management Specialist to help improve how we create, organize, and maintain documentation for both our customers and internal teams. This role will focus on making knowledge clear, customer-friendly, and easy to keep up to date as our products evolve.



You’ll work closely with Support, Product, and Engineering to ensure customers can quickly find answers and internal teams have reliable documentation to support them.



Day in the Life



-Rewrite and reorganize existing content to make it easier for customers to understand

-Create clear, practical documentation including written guides, product walkthroughs, videos, screenshots, and visual tutorials

-Translate technical and product documentation into simple, easy-to-follow guidance

-Use support ticket trends, customer feedback, and data insights to identify gaps and prioritize new content

-Review existing documentation regularly to keep content accurate and up to date

-Collaborate closely with Product, Engineering, and Support on feature launches, changes, and improvements

-Help manage and improve knowledge tools such as Intercom, Notion, internal wikis, help centers, video libraries, and AI-assisted knowledge tools

-Support internal documentation needs and help improve how teams use knowledge systems



Who You Are



-You have 1–3 years of experience creating user guides, help center articles, or other customer-facing documentation

-You have strong written English skills and enjoy writing clear, easy-to-understand content

-You are comfortable turning technical or complex information into practical guidance

-You have experience working with tools like Intercom, Notion, Salesforce, Zendesk, or similar platforms

-You are proactive, curious, and willing to dig in to find answers

-You work well with cross-functional teams and communicate clearly

-You are detail-oriented and take ownership of keeping content accurate and useful

-You are comfortable learning through experimentation and improving content over time

mber to join our Customer Support team as a Customer Support Associate. s, and platform-native formats

Background in social media marketing or advertising

title: Creative Strategist for Meta Ads
description:
Role overview:

- Full-time | Remote

- Own the strategy behind Meta ad creative — turning audience insights into scroll-stopping content that performs.

- For someone who obsesses over why some ads work and others don't.



What you'll do:

- Develop and own creative strategy for paid social campaigns across
 and Instagram, from concept to post-launch analysis.

- Build and maintain a structured creative testing framework — hypotheses, variables, velocity — and turn results into actionable direction for the creative team.

- Brief designers, copywriters, and video editors with clear creative direction rooted in audience psychology and performance data.

- Analyze Meta Ads Manager data (CTR, hook rate, thumbstop, ROAS) and translate findings into creative pivots and new angles.

- Stay ahead of platform changes, creative trends, and competitor activity to keep ad creative fresh and differentiated.

- Collaborate with media buyers to align creative strategy with targeting, budget, and funnel stage objectives.



What you bring:

- 3+ years in paid social, performance marketing, or creative strategy — ideally with hands-on Meta Ads experience.

- Strong understanding of direct response creative principles: hooks, value propositions, social proof, CTAs.

- Comfort reading and acting on performance data without losing the creative instinct that makes great ads.

- Experience writing clear, persuasive, creative briefs and giving structured feedback to creative teams.

- Familiarity with video ad formats (Reels, Stories, in-feed) and what makes them work at each stage of the funnel.



Nice to have:

- Experience at a DTC brand or performance marketing agency.

- Basic skills in Figma, CapCut, or video editing for quick concept mockups.

- Knowledge of UGC production and creator brief writing.

- Familiarity with attribution tools (e.g., Triple Whale, Northbeam) and how they inform creative decisions.

title: Social Media Marketing Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing influencer marketing agency based in the US working with major wellness brands on TikTok Shop creator campaigns. We are looking for a warm, organized, and proactive Full-Time Virtual Assistant to manage the onboarding and day-to-day community experience for our Wellness Partner creator program.

This is a people-first role. Your job is to make every new creator feel personally welcomed, fully set up, and excited to be part of our community. You will be the first point of contact for hundreds of creators joining our
 community, and your warmth and attention to detail will directly impact how engaged and successful they are.



What You Will Do

Welcome every new creator who joins our
 community with a personal message within 30 minutes of them joining

Send personalized 1-on-1 DMs to every new member within 24 hours of them joining

Follow up with new creators to make sure they are set up on TikTok Shop (collab invites, product showcase, content posting)

Post Zoom call links before our daily community calls (Monday to Friday, 7:00 PM EST) and replay links after each call

Monitor the community group throughout the day and respond to questions, comments, and messages

Track which new members have been welcomed and followed up with using a simple spreadsheet

Escalate any complaints, product issues, or sensitive situations to your manager immediately

Help maintain a positive, warm, and active community culture



What We Are Looking For

At least 1 year of experience in customer service, community management, or social media management

Excellent written English - you must be able to write warm, natural, conversational messages that do not sound copy-pasted or robotic

Familiarity with TikTok and TikTok Shop (experience with creator programs or affiliate marketing is a big plus)

Experience using
 (or ability to learn quickly)

Highly organized and reliable - this role requires showing up every day and following a checklist without being reminded

Available to work evenings Philippine time (7:00 PM EST = 7:00 AM PHT the following day) at least 5 days a week

Proactive communicator - you flag problems before they become issues and ask questions when unsure

Genuinely warm and people-oriented - you enjoy making others feel good



Nice to Have

Experience working with influencers, content creators, or UGC campaigns

Experience with TikTok Shop affiliate or creator programs

Experience managing
 groups or communities



Schedule

Full-time, 30 hours per week. Monday to Friday. Must be available for the daily 7:00 PM EST call window (posting links, monitoring chat during the call).

Why Work With Us

Fully remote, work from home

Long-term stable position with room to grow

Supportive team environment - you will have a direct manager (Bella) who is always available to guide you

You will be part of an exciting, fast-growing creator community in the wellness space

Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply

Please send us a short voice or video message (1-2 minutes) introducing yourself and telling us why you would be great at this role. Written applications without a voice or video message will not be considered.



Send to my assistants 



Also include:

Your resume or work history

2-3 examples of customer service or community messages you have written in the past (screenshots are fine)

We are looking for someone who genuinely loves people and takes pride in making others feel welcome. If that sounds like you, we would love to hear from you.

title: Social Media Marketing Strategist
description:
Jumper Media is a forward-thinking digital marketing agency that helps brands build their online presence and achieve measurable growth. As we expand, we’re looking for talented individuals to join our team and help us scale new heights.



The SMM Strategist is responsible for supporting the development and execution of social media strategies, primarily focusing on client Instagram accounts. This role involves curating engaging content, managing social media accounts, and creating insightful reports to assess performance. The SMM Strategist will work closely with the SMM Strategy Head and SMM Creatives to enhance client visibility, engage with audiences, and maintain high levels of client satisfaction and retention.



Salary: starts at $4-5/hr

Work type & schedule: Remote, on-call, semi-flexible working hours

Work Conditions: Need to be reachable between 6 pm to 12mn PHT, Monday to Friday



Responsibilities:

- Content Calendar Development: Create monthly content calendars and briefs for Instagram and other social media platforms aligned with trends and brand messaging.

- Social Media Management: Oversee accounts with consistent posting and strategies to boost visibility and engagement.

- Monthly Reporting: Prepare performance reports with insights to optimize content strategies.

- Collaboration: Partner with creatives and strategists to execute effective campaigns.

- Outbound Engagement: Create strategies to engage followers, influencers, and potential clients on Instagram.

- Client Capacity: Initially manage 3 clients, with the potential for increased capacity as the role evolves.



Qualifications and Skills:

- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

- 2+ years of experience in social media management or digital marketing, with a focus on Instagram preferred.

- Instagram and tech-savvy

- Loves exposing themselves to social media trends and content ideas applicable to the US market

- Handled multiple clients internationally and was able to provide examples of previously Instagram-managed pages

- Responsive and has good English communication skills

- Ability to stay organized and manage multiple tasks

- Has an eye for good design and copy that’s aligned to the US market

- We help businesses and individuals harness the power of social media platforms to build their brands, engage their audiences, and achieve exceptional results.

- Preferably has experience in remote working for marketing agencies abroad

- Fast internet connection

- Reliable device for remote setup



About Us

Welcome to Jumper Media! We are a dynamic and innovative digital marketing agency specializing in social media management and growth strategies.



We help businesses and individuals harness the power of social media platforms to build their brands, engage their audiences, and achieve exceptional results.

nt? Or any commitments that might affect jumper work?

title: Event & Operations Coordinator
description:
Job Title: Event & Operations Coordinator 



Salary: 35,000 – 50,000 PHP per month (depending on experience)

Likely to be 4 hours per day to begin with



About the Role



We are looking for a smart, organised and proactive person to help coordinate small events (typically 10–30 people) and support general business operations.



This role is a combination of:



Event coordination (primary focus)

General admin / EA-style support



This is not a basic data entry role — we are looking for someone who can think, communicate confidently, and take ownership of tasks.



Responsibilities

Event Coordination (Primary Focus)

Research and shortlist venues

Call venues to:

check availability

confirm pricing

negotiate where appropriate

Coordinate bookings and logistics

Ensure events run smoothly and all details are confirmed

Admin & EA Support

Update presentation materials (e.g. event details such as date, time, venue)

Assist with general coordination tasks

Organise information clearly across documents and systems

Support with ad hoc operational and administrative work

Customer Coordination

Confirm attendee bookings

Send event details and updates

Respond to enquiries professionally

AI & Efficiency

Use tools like ChatGPT to:

draft communications

improve workflows

automate repetitive tasks

What We’re Looking For

Must-have:

Strong spoken and written English

Comfortable making phone calls

Highly organised and detail-oriented

Very important:

Confident communicator

Able to negotiate and get better outcomes

Can work independently without constant supervision

Ideal experience:

2–5 years in:

customer service (voice-based)

events / hospitality / travel

admin / EA / operations roles

Salary



?35,000 – ?50,000 per month pro rata for hours

(based on experience and capability)



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered, you must include:



1. A short video (1–2 minutes)



Please answer the following in your video:



Tell us about yourself and your experience

Describe a time you organised something or solved a problem

How would you approach negotiating with a venue to reduce pricing?

2. Written response

Brief summary of your experience

Any experience using AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)

Important



Applications without a video will not be considered.



We are looking for someone reliable, proactive, and confident — not just someone who follows instructions.



If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Customer Support Specialist (Crypto/Web3)
description:
FillX (
) is a hybrid decentralized exchange (DEX) for perpetual futures trading. We are building a 24/7 customer support team to provide round-the-clock assistance to our global user base.



What you'll do:

- Handle user inquiries via
 and live chat - 56 hours per week

- Assist users with deposits, withdrawals, trading issues, and account setup

- Troubleshoot wallet connections, cross-chain transactions, and trading platform features

- Escalate technical issues to the development team when needed

- Maintain a high level of customer satisfaction



Requirements:

- 2+ years of customer support experience in crypto exchanges or Web3 platforms

- Strong understanding of wallets (MetaMask, WalletConnect), DeFi, and perpetual futures trading

- Excellent written English

- Comfortable working rotating shifts



Shift Structure:

We operate on a 3-shift rotation based on Dubai time (GMT+4):

- Shift A: 00:00 - 08:00 $4.5/hour

- Shift B: 08:00 - 16:00 $3.5/hour

- Shift C: 16:00 - 00:00 $5/hour



When applying, please indicate which shift(s) you are available for. Candidates who can cover multiple shifts or are flexible with rotation will be prioritized.



Contact us on

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Manage Seller Center)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Oversee day-to-end e-commerce operations (catalog, price checks, campaign execution, inventory management, shipping, logistics, customer service and returns) for the Seller Center Stores and the international House of Hur accounts across Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan, and Vietnam.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with team and provide ad-hoc support for special events and projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–4 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Bigseller Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.





Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Opportunity to be part of a growing team and Korean Beauty Brands.

- Travel opportunity to Singapore for Company Events.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.







We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you!

title: Digital Marketer
description:
About Us

tripleN Business Solutions is an Australian-based marketing consultancy specialising in the automotive industry. We partner with dealerships across WA to deliver high-performing digital campaigns, lead generation strategies, and creative marketing solutions.



As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team and take ownership of paid media campaigns across multiple platforms.





About the Role



This is a hands-on role ideal for someone who lives and breathes performance marketing. You will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimising paid advertising campaigns—primarily across Google Ads and Meta 
 & Instagram)—with a strong focus on generating qualified leads and measurable ROI.



Key Responsibilities

 • Plan, build, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube)

 • Create and optimise Meta Ads campaigns 
 & Instagram)

 • Monitor campaign performance and continuously optimise for conversions

 • Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and A/B testing

 • Develop compelling ad copy and work with designers on creative assets

 • Analyse data and provide clear, actionable performance reports

 • Manage budgets effectively to maximise ROI

 • Stay up to date with platform updates, trends, and best practices





Skills & Experience

 • Proven experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns (agency or in-house)

 • Strong understanding of conversion tracking, GA4, and performance metrics

 • Experience with lead generation campaigns (highly desirable)

 • Ability to interpret data and make strategic optimisation decisions

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple campaigns



Highly Regarded (but not essential):

 • Experience with TikTok Ads and LinkedIn Ads

 • Experience working in the automotive industry

 • Familiarity with CRM integrations and lead tracking systems





What We’re Looking For

 • A proactive, self-driven marketer who takes ownership

 • Someone who can think strategically but execute tactically

 • Strong communication skills and ability to work remotely

 • A problem-solver who is constantly looking to improve performance





Why Join tripleN

 • Work with a growing, specialised marketing consultancy

 • Exposure to multiple brands and high-impact campaigns

 • Flexible working arrangements (remote-friendly)

 • Opportunity to grow with the business and shape campaign strategy





How to Apply



If you’re passionate about performance marketing and want to be part of a growing Australian agency, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply now with your resume and a brief summary of campaigns you’ve managed (including results).
